senses.definition_ko: 놀라움, 당황함, 초조함, 다급함의 느낌을 나타낼 때 내는 소리.

translations.definition: An exclamation uttered when the speaker expresses his/her surprise, embarrassment, impatience, or urgency.

senses.definition_ko: 잘 맞물려 있던 것이 틀어져서 맞지 않다.

translations.equivalent: be dislocated; be out of joint
translations.definition: For things that are interlocked to become warped and disjointed.

senses.definition_ko: 규칙이나 약속, 명령 등을 지키지 않다.

translations.definition: To violate a rule, promise, order, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 목의 아래 끝에서 팔의 위 끝에 이르는 몸의 부분.

translations.definition: The body part between the lower end of the neck and the upper end of the arm.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿 중에서 어떤.

translations.definition: Asking for particular something or someone within a number of things.

senses.definition_ko: 모르고 있는 동안에 벌써.

translations.definition: Very early while one does not notice.

senses.definition_ko: 알지도 못한 사이에 벌써.

translations.definition: Very early while one does not notice.
translations.example: (You) grew up before I knew it.

senses.definition_ko: ‘어떠하게 하다’가 줄어든 말.

translations.definition: An abbreviated word for ‘어떠하게 하다’ (deal with).
translations.example: You shouldn't leave so much food on your plate!

senses.definition_ko: 어두운 상태나 어두운 때.

translations.definition: A state of being dark or a time when it is dark.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 사물의 특징, 내용, 성격, 성질, 모양 등이 무엇인지 물을 때 쓰는 말.
senses.example_ko:
가: 이 영화는 어떤 영화예요?
나: 무서운 영화예요.

translations.definition: A word used when asking what characteristic, content, personality, quality, shape, etc., a person or object has.
translations.example:
A: What kind of movie is this?
B: It's a scary movie.

senses.definition_ko: 빛이 없거나 약해서 밝지 않다.

translations.definition: Not bright due to the lack of light.

senses.definition_ko: 생각, 느낌, 상태, 형편 등이 어찌 되어 있다.

translations.definition: Being such in one's thoughts, feelings, state, situation, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 모르는 곳을 가리키는 말.

translations.definition: The word that means a place which one does not know.

senses.definition_ko: 생각, 느낌, 상태, 형편 등이 어찌 되어 있다.

translations.definition: Being such in one's thoughts, feelings, state, situation, etc.
translations.example: a certain problem; some kind of problem.

senses.definition_ko: 힘들거나 괴로운 것.

translations.definition: A thing that is difficult and painful to do.

senses.definition_ko: 하기가 복잡하거나 힘이 들다.

translations.definition: Very complicated or hard to do.

senses.definition_ko: (높이는 말로) 아버지의 친구나 그보다 높은 어른.

translations.definition: (polite form) One's father's friend or an elderly person older than him.

senses.definition_ko: 다 자란 사람.

translations.definition: A fully-grown person.

senses.definition_ko: 나이가 비교 대상보다 적다.

translations.definition: Having a lower age in comparison with someone else.
translations.example: to look younger than one's age.

senses.definition_ko: 생각이나 행동이 똑똑하거나 지혜롭지 못하다.

translations.definition: One's thought or behavior not being smart or wise.

senses.definition_ko: 나이가 적은 아이.

translations.definition: An abbreviated word for a young boy or girl.

senses.definition_ko: 4, 5세부터 초등학생까지의 어린아이.

translations.definition: A young boy and girl from those aged four or five to elementary school students.

senses.definition_ko: 자기를 낳아 준 여자를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to refer to or address the woman who has given birth to you.
translations.example: to give one's mother pocket money.

senses.definition_ko: (높임말로) 자기를 낳아 준 여자를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: (honorific) A word used to refer to or address the woman who has procreated as the female parent.
translations.example: to take one's mother to watch a movie.

senses.definition_ko: 잘 모르거나 별로 만나고 싶지 않았던 사람과 마주 대하여 불편하고 자연스럽지 못하다.

translations.definition: Uncomfortable and not natural because one is facing another person whom one does not know well or has not wanted to see.

senses.definition_ko: 일이나 행동을 빨리 하도록 재촉하는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to hurry someone to work or do something quickly.

senses.definition_ko: 주위의 모든 사물이 돌고 있는 듯한 느낌이 들어 몸을 바로잡을 수가 없다.

translations.definition: Unable to balance oneself because it feels as if the world is revolving around oneself.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿이 함께 조화를 이루어 하나가 되다.

translations.definition: For several things to be in harmony and unite as one.
translations.example: to get along with other people.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇이 어떻게 되든, 또는 어떻게 되어 있든.

translations.definition: Regardless of what happened, or how something turned out.
translations.example: Anyhow, the result will be the same.

senses.definition_ko: 오늘의 하루 전날.

translations.definition: The day preceding today.

senses.definition_ko: 뜻밖에 우연히.

translations.definition: Incidentally to one's surprise.
translations.example: to hear a secret by chance.

senses.definition_ko: 오늘의 하루 전날.

translations.definition: The day before the present day.

senses.definition_ko: 확실하지는 않지만 짐작하건대.

translations.definition: Not sure but presumably.

senses.definition_ko: 어제의 밤.

translations.definition: The previous night.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 이유인지는 모르겠지만.

translations.definition: Even though one does not know the reason.

senses.definition_ko: (강조하는 말로) 어떤 강도나 정도가 대단하게.
senses.example_ko: 날씨가 어찌나 더운지 밖에 나갈 수가 없다.

translations.definition: (emphasizing form) With a strong intensity or in a great degree.
translations.example: The weather is too hot to go outside.

senses.definition_ko: 매우 힘들거나 기가 막히거나 좌절할 때 내는 소리.

translations.definition: An exclamation uttered when the speaker feels exhausted, stunned, or frustrated.
translations.example: Phew, when am I going to finish this?

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 어떻게 하다.

translations.definition: To do something in a certain manner.
translations.example: Nothing can be done about it.

senses.definition_ko: 만의 만 배인 수.
senses.example_ko: 일 년에 억 단위의 돈을 벌다.

translations.definition: The number that is the product of ten thousand times ten thousand.
translations.example: to make hundreds of millions of won in a year.

entry.visual_material: Two people talking, with one saying '어차피 가야 할 거면 얼른 출발하자!' in a speech bubble.

senses.definition_ko: 이렇게 되든지 저렇게 되든지. 또는 이렇게 하든지 저렇게 하든지 상관없이.
senses.example_ko: 어차피 가야 할 거면 얼른 출발하자!

translations.definition: Regardless of whether something turns out like this or that; regardless of whether one does something in this way or that.
translations.example: If we have to go anyway, let's hurry up and get going.

senses.definition_ko: 말소리의 높낮이를 변하게 함. 또는 그런 변화.

translations.definition: An act of changing the rise and fall of the voice, or such a change.
translations.example: to speak in a strong accent.

senses.definition_ko: 잘못한 것도 없이 피해를 입어 속이 상하고 답답하다.

translations.definition: Feeling distressed and frustrated because one has suffered damage although one did not do anything wrong.
translations.example: to tell (someone) about an unfair situation.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 범위에서 쓰이는 낱말의 수. 또는 그런 낱말 전체.

translations.definition: The number of words used within a particular scope; or the aggregate of such words.

senses.definition_ko: 이치나 조건에 맞지 않게 무리를 해서 강제로.

translations.definition: In an unreasonable and forcible way that does not meet common sense or the situation.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일이나 문제에 대해 말함.

translations.definition: An act of talking about a certain matter or problem.
translations.example: There is no mention of the test.

senses.definition_ko: 알지 못하는 어느 때에.

translations.definition: At some time one does not know.
translations.example: When did you come to Korea?

senses.definition_ko: 여자가 형제나 친척 형제들 중에서 자기보다 나이가 많은 여자를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used only by a female to refer to or address her female siblings or cousins older than herself.

senses.definition_ko: 어느 때에나. 또는 때에 따라 달라지지 않고 변함없이.

translations.definition: Every time; invariably without changing with time.

senses.definition_ko: 낮은 산처럼 비스듬하게 경사져 있고, 보통 땅보다 약간 높이 솟아 있는 곳.

translations.definition: An area raised slightly higher than the ground level, slanting like a small mountain.

senses.definition_ko: 미래의 어느 때에.

translations.definition: Sometime in the future.
translations.example: I really want to go to Africa someday.

senses.definition_ko: 신문이나 방송 등의 매체에서 어떤 사실이나 의견을 널리 알리는 것.

translations.definition: The act of publicizing a certain fact or opinion by the media such as newspaper, radio, television, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 위에 올려놓다.

translations.definition: To put something on top of something else.

senses.definition_ko: 생각이나 느낌 등을 나타내거나 전달하는 음성이나 문자 등의 수단. 또는 그 체계.

translations.definition: The means of communication, such as sounds, letters, etc., for expressing or conveying one's thoughts or feelings; or the system of such means.

senses.definition_ko: 특별한 노력이나 대가 없이 받아 가지다.

translations.definition: To take and have something without special efforts or without paying for it.

senses.definition_ko: 눈, 코, 입이 있는 머리의 앞쪽 부분.

translations.definition: The front part of the head that has the eyes, nose and mouth.

senses.definition_ko: 액체나 물기가 있는 물체가 찬 기운으로 인해 고체 상태로 굳어지다.

translations.definition: For a liquid or moist material to become solidified by a cold energy.

senses.definition_ko: 본바탕에 다른 색깔의 점이나 줄 등이 섞인 자국.

translations.definition: A mark on a background, made up of spots or streaks different in color from the background.

senses.definition_ko: 시간을 오래 끌지 않고 바로.

translations.definition: Right away without lingering over something.

senses.definition_ko: 잘 모르는 수량, 값, 정도.

translations.definition: A number, amount, price, and degree that one does not know exactly.

senses.definition_ko: 별로 많지 않은 양이나 정도.

translations.definition: A state of not being very many or much in quantity or degree.

senses.definition_ko: 상태나 느낌 등의 정도가 매우 크고 대단하게.

translations.definition: In a great and enormous degree in terms of a state or feeling.

entry.visual_material: Diagram showing water turning into ice and vice versa. Text labels: 수증기 (steam), 얼다 (freeze), 물 (water), 녹다 (melt), 얼음 (ice).

senses.definition_ko: 물이 얼어서 굳은 것.

translations.definition: Frozen and hardened water.

senses.definition_ko: 말, 태도, 규칙 등이 매우 엄하고 철저하다.

translations.definition: Being very strict and thorough in one's speech, attitude, rules, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 직장 등에서 맡아서 하는 일.

translations.definition: The work assigned in a workplace, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 격식을 갖추지 않아도 되는 상황에서 어머니를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to refer to or address one's mother in an informal situation.

senses.definition_ko: 사업이나 연구 등에서 노력과 수고를 들여 이룩해 놓은 결과.

translations.definition: Results that one achieves through endeavor and hard work in business, research, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 양이 아주 많거나 정도가 아주 심하다.

translations.definition: Unusually large in size or degree.

senses.definition_ko: 이익을 얻기 위해 특정 사업을 하는 단체.

translations.definition: An organization that does a certain business for gaining profits.

senses.definition_ko: 같은 산업이나 상업 부문에서 일하는 사람들의 활동 분야.

translations.definition: The area of activity for people engaged in the same industrial or commercial field.
translations.example: to work in the service industry.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사실이나 현상이 현실로 존재하지 않는 상태이다.

translations.definition: (for a fact or phenomenon to be) Not existence in reality.

senses.definition_ko: 주로 사람을 등에 대고 손으로 붙잡거나 무엇으로 붙들어 매어 떨어지지 않도록 하다.

translations.definition: To carry a person on one's back by holding him/her with one's hands or tying him/her with something.
translations.example: to carry a child on one's back.

senses.definition_ko: 어떠한 일, 현상, 증상, 감정 등을 나타나지 않게 하다.

translations.definition: To make a certain matter, phenomenon, symptom, feeling, etc., disappear.
translations.example: to get rid of the pain.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일이나 증상 등이 나타나지 않게.

translations.definition: Without any matter, symptom, etc.
translations.example: to finish the construction without an accident.

senses.definition_ko: 바로 며칠 전.

translations.definition: The time of being just a few days ago.
translations.example: The weather was cold until a few days ago.

senses.definition_ko: 허리와 허벅지 사이의 부분으로 앉았을 때 바닥에 닿는, 살이 많은 부위.

translations.definition: The fleshy part between the waist and thigh that touches the floor when one is sitting.

senses.definition_ko: 배가 아래로 향하게 하여 몸 전체를 바닥에 대다.

translations.definition: To have one's entire body touch the floor with the belly facing downward.
translations.example: to lie face down on the floor.

senses.definition_ko: 상식적으로 생각하는 것과 전혀 다르다.

translations.definition: Completely different from what is considered common sense.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 육체적, 정신적 활동을 하는 데 필요한 힘.

translations.definition: The strength necessary for doing physical and mental activities.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 물건이나 장소, 기분 등이 지저분하거나 복잡한 상태.

translations.definition: A state in which a certain object, place, feeling, etc., is disorderly or complicated.

senses.definition_ko: 차가운 공기를 나오게 하고 습도를 조절하는 장치.

translations.definition: A device that generates cool air and controls humidity.
translations.example: to turn on the air conditioner.

senses.definition_ko: 엉뚱한 말이나 행동. 또는 그런 말이나 행동을 하는 사람.

translations.definition: A nonsensical utterance or act, or a person who talks or acts in such a manner.

senses.definition_ko: 동력을 이용하여 사람이나 짐을 위아래로 실어 나르는 장치.

translations.definition: A device that transports people or freight between floors by using motive power.

senses.definition_ko: 여성으로 태어난 사람.

translations.definition: A person who was born as a female.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 나라를 여행하는 사람의 신분이나 국적을 증명하고, 여행하는 나라에 그 사람의 보호를 맡기는 문서.

translations.definition: An official document that proves a traveler's nationality or identity in a foreign country, and requests his/her protection for the country.

senses.definition_ko: 일을 하지 않는 시간. 또는 일을 하는 중간에 생기는 여유로운 시간.

translations.definition: The time when one is not working; or the time for relaxation in the middle of working.

senses.definition_ko: 말하는 사람에게 가까운 곳을 가리키는 말.

translations.definition: A pronoun used to indicate a place close to the speaker.

senses.definition_ko: 이미 주어진 조건.

translations.definition: A given condition.

senses.definition_ko: 마음속으로 어떤 대상을 무엇으로 또는 어떻게 생각하다.

translations.definition: To consider a subject as something in one's mind.
translations.example: to think of (someone) as a friend.

senses.definition_ko: '여자 고등학교'를 줄여 이르는 말.

translations.definition: An abbreviated word for girls' high school.
translations.example: one's time at the girls' high school.

senses.definition_ko: 일곱에 하나를 더한 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the sum of seven and one.

senses.definition_ko: 손님에게 일정한 돈을 받고 잠을 잘 수 있는 방을 내어 주는 집.

translations.definition: A place that accommodates guests in exchange for a certain amount of money.

senses.definition_ko: 순서가 여덟 번째인 차례.

translations.definition: The eighth number in a sequence.
translations.example: to be the eighth person to make a presentation.

senses.definition_ko: 여자 동생.

translations.definition: A sister who is younger than oneself.

senses.definition_ko: 주로 사춘기에 얼굴이나 몸 등에 볼록하게 솟아 나오는 붉고 작은 염증.

translations.definition: A small inflammation usually occurring in adolescence, accompanying redness and swelling on the face, body, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 열의 여덟 배가 되는 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the product of eight times ten.
translations.example: to want to work until (the age of) eighty.

senses.definition_ko: 많은 수의.

translations.definition: A large number of.

senses.definition_ko: 듣는 사람이 여러 명일 때 그 사람들을 높여 이르는 말.

translations.definition: A pronoun used to respectfully address multiple listeners.

senses.definition_ko: 여러 개.

translations.definition: Many things.

senses.definition_ko: 네 계절 중의 하나로 봄과 가을 사이의 더운 계절.

translations.definition: One of four seasons which is hot and comes between spring and fall.

senses.definition_ko: 계절이 여름인 때.

translations.definition: The season of summer.

senses.definition_ko: 부부가 서로를 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used by a husband or wife to address each other.

senses.definition_ko: 전화 통화에서 상대방을 부를 때 하는 말.

translations.definition: An exclamation used to call the other person on the phone.

senses.definition_ko: 그러함과 그러하지 않음.

translations.equivalent: yes or no; whether or not
translations.definition: Either yes or no.
translations.example: to determine whether something is true.

senses.definition_ko: 다섯에 하나를 더한 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the sum of five and one.
translations.example: to buy six pieces of bread.

senses.definition_ko: 순서가 여섯 번째인 차례.

translations.definition: The sixth number in a sequence.
translations.example: to sit in the sixth row from the front.

senses.definition_ko: 어른이 되어 아이를 낳을 수 있는 여자.

translations.definition: A grown-up woman capable of having a baby.

senses.definition_ko: 시간이나 공간, 돈 등이 넉넉하여 남음이 있는 상태.

translations.definition: A state in which there is abundant time, space, money, etc., enough to spare.

senses.definition_ko: 시간이나 공간, 돈 등이 넉넉하여 남음이 있다.

translations.definition: Being a state in which there is abundant time, space, money, etc., enough to spare.

senses.definition_ko: 어른인 여자.

translations.definition: An adult female.

senses.definition_ko: 여성으로 태어난 사람.

translations.definition: A person who was born a female.
translations.example: There are many women at my company.

senses.definition_ko: 전과 똑같이.

translations.definition: The same as someone or something was before.
translations.example: to be as pretty as before.

senses.definition_ko: 윗어른에게 말씀을 드리다.

translations.definition: To ask one's elders something.

senses.definition_ko: 웃어른에게 말씀을 드리다.

translations.definition: To ask one's elders something.

senses.definition_ko: 집을 떠나 다른 지역이나 외국을 두루 구경하며 다니는 일.

translations.definition: The act of going away from home, and visiting other places or foreign countries and doing sightseeing.

senses.definition_ko: 여행을 취미가 아닌 직업이나 전문으로 하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who specializes in travel or travels as an occupation, not as a hobby.

senses.definition_ko: 여행에 필요한 교통, 숙박, 관광 안내 등을 하는 회사.

translations.definition: A company that offers an array of services for travel, including transportation, accomodation, tour guide, etc.
translations.example: to work at a travel agency.

senses.definition_ko: 여행하는 곳.

translations.definition: A place where one travels.
translations.example: to decide on the destination for one's honeymoon.

senses.definition_ko: 열차가 출발하고 도착하는 곳.

translations.definition: A place where a train departs and arrives.
translations.example: to board a train at the station.

senses.definition_ko: 인간 사회가 시간이 지남에 따라 흥하고 망하면서 변해 온 과정. 또는 그 기록.

translations.definition: The process of a human society where it flourishes and collapses with time, or the records of such process.

senses.definition_ko: 끈이나 실 등의 여러 가닥을 이리저리 걸어 묶어서 어떤 물건을 만들다.

translations.definition: To make something by interlacing several strings, pieces of thread, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 역사를 전문적으로 연구하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who studies history professionally.

senses.definition_ko: 한 해.

translations.definition: A year.

senses.definition_ko: 인간 사회가 시간이 지남에 따라 흥하고 망하면서 변해 온 과정에 관한 것. 또는 그러한 기록에 관한 것.

translations.definition: Something about the process of a human society where it flourishes and collapses with time, or the records of such a process.

senses.definition_ko: 일 년 동안.

translations.definition: For a year.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것과 마찬가지로.

translations.definition: Likewise.
translations.example: I'm thinking the same thing as you.

senses.definition_ko: 둘 이상의 사물이나 현상 등이 서로 이어지거나 관계를 맺음.

translations.definition: Two or more things or phenomena being connected or related to each other.

senses.definition_ko: 맡은 일 또는 해야 하는 일.

translations.definition: Activities assigned to someone or that he/she has to do.

senses.definition_ko: 피부에 발라서 병이나 상처를 치료하는 약.

translations.definition: A medicament applied to the skin in order to heal a disease or wound on it.

senses.definition_ko: 둘 이상의 사물이나 현상 등이 서로 관계를 맺는 것.

translations.definition: Two or more things, phenomena, etc., being related to each other.
translations.example: Lifestyle habits and health are closely related.

senses.definition_ko: 전문적으로 연구를 하는 것이 직업인 사람.

translations.definition: A person who specializes in conducting research as a job.
translations.example: to work as a specialized researcher.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사물이나 일에 관련된 사실을 밝히기 위해 그에 대해 자세히 조사하고 분석하는 일.

translations.definition: The act of investigating and analyzing an object or matter in detail in order to find a fact related to it.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사물이나 일에 관련된 사실을 밝히기 위해 그에 대해 자세히 조사하고 분석하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who investigates and analyzes an object or matter in detail in order to find a fact related to it.
translations.example: to ask a researcher a technical question.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사물이나 일을 자세히 조사하고 분석하는 일을 전문으로 하는 기관.

translations.definition: An institute that specializes in investigating and analyzing an object or matter in detail.

senses.definition_ko: 배우가 무대 위에서 대본에 따라 관객에게 연기를 보이는 것.

translations.definition: An act in which an actor or actress acts on a stage according to a script for the audience.

senses.definition_ko: 연구를 전문적으로 하기 위해 사용되는 방.

translations.definition: A room used for conducting professional research.
translations.example: to study in the laboratory/professor's office.

senses.definition_ko: 정해진 시기를 뒤로 미룸.

translations.definition: The act of deferring to a later time.
translations.example: to decide on an indefinite delay.

senses.definition_ko: 물체가 불에 탈 때 생겨나는 기체.

translations.definition: A gas created when something burns.

senses.definition_ko: 배우가 맡은 역할에 따라 인물, 성격, 행동 등을 표현해 내는 것.

translations.definition: An actor or actress expressing the character, personality, behavior, etc., of a role he/she plays.

senses.definition_ko: 연기하는 것이 직업인 사람.

translations.definition: A person who acts professionally.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일이 일어난 시기를 말하기 위해 편의상 구분한 일 년의 기간.

translations.definition: A period of one year, a time unit created for convenience in order to refer to the time of an occurrence.

senses.definition_ko: 완두콩의 빛깔 같은 연한 초록색.

translations.definition: Light green like the color of a pea.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사실을 전하여 알림.

translations.definition: The act of delivering a fact.
translations.example: to agree to contact a younger student/junior colleague.

senses.definition_ko: 연락을 주고받을 수 있는 전화번호나 장소.

translations.definition: A telephone number or address via which one can contact someone else.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 살아온 햇수.

translations.definition: The number of years one has lived.
translations.example: to be affected by an age restriction.

senses.definition_ko: 한 해의 끝 무렵.

translations.definition: The year's end.
translations.example: to hold a meeting at the end of the year.

senses.definition_ko: 깊고 넓게 파인 땅에 물이 고여 있는 곳.

translations.definition: A deep and wide depression with water in it.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 잘할 수 있도록 반복하여 익힘.

translations.definition: The act of doing something repeatedly in order to be good at it.

senses.definition_ko: 한 직장에서 계속 일하는 사람이 일 년 동안 정기적으로 받는 보수의 총액.

translations.definition: The total amount of the salaries that an employee receives regularly for a year.

senses.definition_ko: 남자와 여자가 서로 사랑해서 사귐.

translations.definition: A man and a woman loving each other and having a romantic relationship.

entry.visual_material: A person holding an umbrella in the rain, wearing rain boots. Labels are '비' (rain), '우산' (umbrella), '장화' (rain boots).

senses.definition_ko: 긴 막대 위에 지붕 같은 막을 펼쳐서 비가 올 때 손에 들고 머리 위를 가리는 도구.

translations.definition: A public institution whose work involves delivering letters and packages, or managing monetary deposits, etc.
translations.example: to go to the post office and mail a letter.

entry.visual_material: Person putting a letter ('우편물') into a mailbox ('우편함').

senses.definition_ko: 편지나 소포 등을 보내거나 받는 것.

translations.definition: Things such as letters, packages, etc., which are sent and received by mail.

senses.definition_ko: 편지나 소포 등과 같이 우편으로 받거나 보내는 물건.

translations.definition: Things such as letters, packages, etc., which are sent and received by mail.

senses.definition_ko: 우편물을 받을 수 있도록 벽이나 대문, 건물의 입구 등에 달아 놓는 작은 상자.

translations.definition: A small box hung on the wall or at the gate, the entrance of a building, etc., for receiving mail.

senses.definition_ko: 차 등이 오른쪽으로 돔.

translations.definition: The motion of a car, etc., turning toward right.

senses.definition_ko: 인간의 힘으로는 바꿀 수 없는, 이미 정해져 있는 인간의 운명.

translations.definition: The determined fate of a person, unchangeable by his/her power.

senses.definition_ko: 몸을 단련하거나 건강을 위하여 몸을 움직이는 일.

translations.definition: The act of moving one's body in order to train it or improve one's health.

senses.definition_ko: 운동하는 데 드는 힘의 양.

translations.definition: The amount of energy exerted during a physical exercise.
translations.example: to adjust the amount of exercise.

senses.definition_ko: 운동할 때 입는 옷.

translations.definition: The clothes worn when doing an exercise.

entry.visual_material: A girl running on a sports field with "농구" (basketball), "축구" (soccer), "운동" (exercise), "운동장" (playground), and "달리기" (running) labeled.

senses.definition_ko: 운동 경기, 놀이 등을 할 수 있도록 여러 가지 기구나 시설을 갖춘 넓은 마당.

translations.definition: A wide yard equipped with a variety of apparatus and facilities for sports or play.
translations.example: to run on the sports field.

senses.definition_ko: 운동을 할 때 신도록 만든 신발.

translations.definition: Shoes worn when doing an exercise.

senses.definition_ko: 인간과 세상 모든 것에 영향을 미치는 초인적이고 필연적인 힘. 또는 그 힘에 의해 이미 정해진 목숨이나 상태.

translations.definition: A superhuman and inevitable force that affects humans and all the things in the world; or the life or state predetermined by the force.

senses.definition_ko: 물건 등을 옮겨 나름.

translations.definition: The act of carrying things, etc.
translations.example: to be in charge of transporting items for a moving company.

senses.definition_ko: 조직이나 기구, 사업체 등을 관리하고 이끌어 나감.

translations.definition: An act of managing and leading an organization, group, business entity, etc.
translations.example: to take part in running a company.

senses.definition_ko: 기계나 자동차를 움직이고 조종함.

translations.definition: The act of moving and handling a machine or car.

senses.definition_ko: 기계나 자동차 등의 운전을 직업으로 하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person whose occupation is to operate a machine or car, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 정해진 길을 따라 자동차나 열차 등이 다님.

translations.definition: A car or train, etc., running along a preset route.

senses.definition_ko: 슬프거나 아프거나 너무 좋아서 참지 못하고 눈물을 흘리다 또는 그렇게 눈물을 흘리며 소리를 내다.

translations.definition: To shed tears out of unbearable joy, pain, or delight, or to make sounds while shedding tears.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇이 소리를 내다.

translations.definition: For something to make a sound.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 사람을 웃게 하다.

translations.definition: To make another person laugh.

senses.definition_ko: 슬프거나 아프거나 너무 좋아서 소리를 흘리게 하다.

senses.definition_ko: 기쁘거나 만족스럽거나 우스울 때 얼굴을 활짝 펴거나 소리를 내다.

translations.definition: To smile big or make a sound when one is happy or satisfied.

senses.definition_ko: 소리를 내면서 눈물을 흘리는 일.

translations.definition: The act of making a sound and shedding tears at the same time.

senses.definition_ko: 나이나 지위, 신분 등이 자기보다 높아서 모셔야 하는 윗사람.

translations.definition: A person who is older, or senior in status or position and thus should be treated with respect.

senses.definition_ko: 위치나 자세가 바뀌다. 또는 위치나 자리를 바꾸다.

translations.definition: For a position or posture to change; to change a position or posture.

senses.definition_ko: 웃는 행동. 또는 웃는 모양이나 소리.

translations.definition: The act of laughing or smiling, the way one laughs or smiles, or the sound that one makes when he/she laughs.

senses.definition_ko: 자세나 자리 등이 바뀜.

translations.definition: A change in a posture, position, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 아주.
senses.example_ko: 집값이 워낙 비싸서 당장 살 수 없다.

translations.definition: Very much.
translations.example: Houses are so expensive that (we) can't buy one right now.

senses.definition_ko: 둥근 모양이나 형태.

translations.definition: A round shape or form.

senses.definition_ko: 사물의 본질이나 바탕이 되는 이치.

translations.definition: The logic that is the essence or base of an object.

entry.visual_material: Illustration of an apple with price 1,000 won

senses.definition_ko: 한국의 화폐 단위.

translations.definition: A Korean monetary unit.

senses.definition_ko: 성격이 부드럽고 너그럽다.

translations.definition: One's personality being gentle and generous.

senses.definition_ko: 회사나 학교 등에 지원하는 내용을 적은 서류.

translations.definition: A document that contains the details of an application for a company or school, etc.
translations.example: to submit an application for school admission.

senses.definition_ko: 맨 처음부터. 또는 근본부터.

translations.definition: From the first; innately.

senses.definition_ko: 꼬리가 길며 주로 얼굴과 엉덩이에 털이 없고, 나무에 잘 올라가며 사람과 닮은 동물.

translations.definition: A human-looking animal with a long tail and bare face and buttocks that is good at climbing trees.

senses.definition_ko: 방 하나가 침실, 거실, 부엌, 식당의 기능을 모두 하는 집.

translations.definition: A house in which one room functions as a bedroom, living room, and kitchen.
translations.example: to live in a studio apartment.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일이 일어나게 하거나 어떤 사물의 상태를 바꾸는 근본이 된 일이나 사건.

translations.definition: An affair or event that acts as the root of an occurrence of a certain thing or change of an object's state.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 행동이나 이론 등에서 일관되게 지켜야 하는 기본적인 규칙이나 법칙.

translations.definition: A basic rule or law that one is expected to follow consistently in a certain act or theory, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 다달이 집이나 방을 빌려 쓰는 것. 또는 그 돈.

translations.definition: The act of renting a house or room on a monthly basis; money spent on renting a house or room on a monthly basis.

senses.definition_ko: 윗옷과 치마가 하나로 붙어 있는 여자 겉옷.

translations.definition: A woman's outer garment made of one piece.

senses.definition_ko: 한 주가 시작되는 첫 날.

translations.definition: The first day of a week.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 바라거나 하고자 하다.

translations.definition: To hope for something or desire to do something.

senses.definition_ko: 어찌 된.

translations.definition: What.

senses.definition_ko: 일한 대가로 한 달마다 지급하는 보수.

translations.definition: Money paid for one's labor on a monthly basis.

senses.definition_ko: 크게 벗어나지 않는 정도에 있다.

translations.definition: Not seriously transgressing the bounds of a certain standard.
translations.example: to be as patient as one can.

senses.definition_ko: 그달의 끝 무렵.

translations.definition: The time around the end of the month.
translations.example: It is the end of the month.

senses.definition_ko: 어찌 된 일. 또는 어떤 뜻밖의 일.

translations.definition: How a certain affair comes to pass; or a certain unexpected affair.
translations.example: to come early for some reason.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 기준보다 더 높은 쪽. 또는 중간보다 더 높은 쪽.

translations.definition: A higher position than a certain standard; a higher position than the middle.
translations.example: Drops of water fall from above.

senses.definition_ko: 등급이나 등수를 나타내는 단위.

translations.definition: A unit used to indicate a rank or order.

senses.definition_ko: 위험한 고비. 위험해서 아슬아슬한 순간.

translations.definition: A dangerously critical moment or risky moment.

senses.definition_ko: 뛰어나고 훌륭하다.

translations.definition: Remarkable and outstanding.

senses.definition_ko: 따뜻한 말이나 행동 등으로 괴로움을 덜어 주거나 슬픔을 달래 줌.

translations.definition: The act of easing someone's pain or sadness through warm words or behavior, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 법, 명령, 약속 등을 지키지 않고 어김.

translations.definition: The act of breaking the law, an order, promise, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 위와 아래.

translations.definition: A compound noun meaning up and down.

senses.definition_ko: 일반 행정과과는 달리 어느 정도 독립된 분야에서 어떤 일의 처리를 맡아 의논하는 기관.

translations.definition: An institution that discusses and handles a certain matter in a fairly independent field unlike general administration.

senses.definition_ko: 위가 되는 자리나 방향.

translations.definition: An upper place or upward direction.
translations.example: to look up at a building.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 층보다 위에 있는 층.

translations.definition: The floor just above a certain floor.
translations.example: to bump into someone who lives on the upper floor.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 곳에 자리를 차지함. 또는 그 자리.

translations.definition: The state of having taken up space in a place; such space.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 이롭게 하거나 도우려 하다.

translations.definition: To try to benefit or help someone or something.
translations.example: to be for the benefit of one's family.

senses.definition_ko: 해를 입거나 다칠 가능성이 있어 안전하지 못함. 또는 그런 상태.

translations.definition: A state of not being safe due to the possibility of suffering loss or being hurt; or such a state.

senses.definition_ko: 위험한 성질이나 위험해질 가능성.

translations.definition: A quality of being dangerous or becoming risky.

senses.definition_ko: 무서운 말이나 행동으로 상대방이 두려움을 느끼도록 함.

translations.definition: The act of making someone feel afraid, with fierce words or behavior.

senses.definition_ko: 가족 관계에서 자신보다 나이나 위치가 많거나 위인 사람.

translations.definition: A person who is older or higher than oneself in a family.

senses.definition_ko: 삼강오륜을 덕목으로 하며 사서삼경을 경전으로 하는, 종교로서의 유학.

senses.definition_ko: 상태나 성격, 행동 등이 보통과 아주 다르게.

translations.definition: In the manner of a state, one's personality, behavior, etc., being very uncommon.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 물건을 원하는 방향이나 장소로 이끌.

translations.example: to take steps to bring about dialogue between the two countries.

senses.definition_ko: 구경하는 사람들을 태우고 다니는 배.

translations.definition: A ship sailing with passengers who are sightseers.

senses.definition_ko: 아시아의 서북쪽에 있는 육대주1의 하나. 우랄산맥2을 사이에 두고 아시아와 접해 있으며 프랑스, 독일, 이탈리아 등의 나라가 위치한다.

translations.definition: One of the six continents, located west of Asia and bordering it along the Ural Mountains.

senses.definition_ko: 이익이 있다.

translations.definition: Having an advantage.

senses.definition_ko: 요금을 내게 되어 있음.

translations.definition: The state of charging toll, fare, fee, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 남을 웃기는 행동이나 말.

translations.definition: An act or remark that makes people laugh.
translations.example: to have an outstanding sense of humor.

senses.definition_ko: 이름이 널리 알려져 있음.

translations.definition: The state of one's name being widely known.

senses.definition_ko: 투명하고 잘 깨지는 창문이나 거울 등에 사용되는 물질.

translations.definition: The material used to make windows, mirrors etc., that is transparent, hard, and easily broken.

senses.definition_ko: 앞선 시대에 살았던 사람들이 후대에 남긴 물건.

translations.definition: Things left by people who lived in former ages.

senses.definition_ko: 유리를 끼워 만든 창.

translations.definition: A window made by inserting glass.

senses.definition_ko: 죽은 사람이 남겨 놓은 재산.

translations.definition: The property left behind after one's death.

senses.definition_ko: 일 년 열두 달 가운데 여섯째 달.

senses.definition_ko: 오직 하나만 있음.

translations.definition: The state of being the only one.
translations.example: the only one in the world.

senses.definition_ko: 남아 있는 역사적인 자취.

translations.definition: A remaining historic trace.

senses.definition_ko: 역사적 유물이나 유적이 있는 곳.

translations.definition: The place where a historic relic or remains are.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 상태나 상황 등을 그대로 이어 나감.

translations.definition: An act of keeping a certain state, situation, etc., as it is.

senses.definition_ko: 말을 하거나 글을 읽을 때 거침이 없다.

translations.definition: Speaking without reserve or reading briskly.

senses.definition_ko: 초등학교 입학 이전의 어린이들을 교육하는 기관 및 시설.

translations.definition: The institute and facilities that are made to educate children before they start school.

senses.definition_ko: 수준이 낮거나 미숙하다.

translations.definition: Immature and not fully developed.

senses.definition_ko: 상품이 생산자에게서 소비자에게 이르기까지 여러 단계에서 거래되는 활동.

translations.definition: The activity of transacting goods through several stages from a producer to a consumer.
translations.example: to be in the business of distributing agricultural goods.

senses.definition_ko: 외국에 머물러 살면서 공부함.

translations.definition: The state of staying abroad and studying.

senses.definition_ko: 외국에 머물러 살면서 공부하는 학생.

translations.definition: A student who stays abroad and studies.
translations.example: to maintain one's status as an international student.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇이 사람들에게 인기를 얻어 사회 전체에 널리 퍼짐.

translations.definition: The state of something gaining popularity among people and being widely spread to an entire society.

senses.definition_ko: 성격이나 특징, 모양 등이 비슷한 것끼리 묶은 하나의 무리. 또는 그 무리에 속하는 것.

translations.definition: A group of things that are categorized according to their nature, characteristics, shapes, etc., or something that belongs to that group.

senses.definition_ko: 마음이 쏠리거나 잘못된 행동을 하도록 꾐.

senses.definition_ko: 오에 일을 더한 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the sum of five and one.

senses.definition_ko: 도로나 철로 위를 건너갈 수 있도록 만든 다리.

senses.definition_ko: 십의 여섯 배가 되는 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the product of six times ten.
translations.example: to be over sixty years old.

senses.definition_ko: 지구에서 물로 된 부분이 아닌 흙이나 돌로 된 부분.

translations.definition: The part of the earth consisting of soil, rocks, stones, etc., not water.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 몸.

translations.definition: A human body.

senses.definition_ko: 편을 갈라 교대로 윷을 던져 윷판 위의 말을 움직여 승부를 겨루는 놀이.

translations.equivalent: yunnori; playing yut; game of yut
translations.definition: A game in which players compete with pieces to reach the finish line first, as they throw a set of four yut sticks and move the pieces.

senses.definition_ko: 마음에 들지 않거나 걱정스러울 때 하는 소리.

translations.definition: An exclamation uttered when the speaker does not like something or feels anxious about it.

senses.definition_ko: 자신이 놀랐을 때, 또는 남을 놀라게 할 때 크게 지르는 소리.

senses.definition_ko: 달이 지구를 한 바퀴 도는 데 걸리는 시간을 기준으로 하여 날짜를 세는 달력.

translations.definition: A calendar used to count days based on the time that the moon takes to orbit around the earth.

senses.definition_ko: 귀금속이나 그릇 등을 만드는 데 쓰이는, 흰 광택이 나고 무른 성질이 있는 금속.

translations.definition: Metal that is used to make precious stones, kitchenware, etc., that is white and smooth.

senses.definition_ko: 물이나 물처럼 마시는 모든 액체.

senses.definition_ko: 사람들의 돈을 맡아 관리하고 필요한 사람에게 돈을 빌려주는 기관.

translations.definition: An institute that keeps and manages the money people have deposited and lends it to those who need it.
translations.example: to deposit money in the bank.

senses.definition_ko: 마시는 물.

translations.definition: Water that one can drink.

senses.definition_ko: 자연이나 사람이 기꺼이 베풀어 주는 도움.

translations.definition: The help given with pleasure by nature or a person.

senses.definition_ko: 음악이 여러 곡 담겨 있는 시디나 카세트테이프, 레코드판.

translations.definition: A CD, cassette tape, or record disk in which many songs are stored.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 목소리나 말소리.

translations.definition: A human voice or sound of speech.

senses.definition_ko: 음식을 만들어서 파는 가게.

translations.definition: A business cooking and selling food.
translations.example: to have a meal at a restaurant.

senses.definition_ko: 밥이나 국 등과 같이 사람이 끼니때 먹는 것.

translations.definition: A dish such as steamed rice or soup that a person eats at a meal.

senses.definition_ko: 목소리나 악기로 박자와 가락이 있게 소리 내어 생각이나 감정을 표현하는 예술.

translations.definition: A field of art, in which one expresses one's thoughts or emotions by using one's voice or a musical instrument to make sounds with beats and melody.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 먹거나 마시는 것.

senses.definition_ko: 작곡가, 연주가, 성악가 등과 같이 음악을 전문적으로 하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who does music professionally such as a composer, instrumentalist, vocalist, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 음악을 연주하여 사람들이 음악을 들을 수 있게 마련한 모임.

B: Yeah.

A: Are you there?

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 노동력.

translations.definition: Working force of people.

senses.definition_ko: 전 세계의 모든 사람.

translations.definition: All of the people in the world.

senses.definition_ko: 인삼을 넣어 끓인 차.

translations.definition: An herbal tea brewed from ginseng.

senses.definition_ko: 사람 그 자체.

translations.definition: A person himself/herself.

senses.definition_ko: 사람 얼굴의 생김새.

translations.definition: The appearance of a person's face.
translations.example: to look like a nice person.

senses.definition_ko: 사람 수를 기준으로 분량을 세는 단위.

translations.definition: A bound noun that serves as a unit for measuring a quantity as a portion per person.
translations.example: to buy three portions of pork bellies.

senses.definition_ko: 물건 값이나 월급, 요금 등을 올림.

translations.definition: An act of raising the price of goods, wage, fare, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 만나거나 헤어질 때에 예의를 나타냄. 또는 그런 말이나 행동.

translations.definition: The act of showing courtesy when meeting or saying goodbye to someone, or such words or actions.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 대상이 주는 느낌.

translations.definition: The appearance or feeling that a person or object gives to others.
translations.example: to have a good look; to make a good impression.

senses.definition_ko: 건강에 도움을 주는 약초로 뿌리를 먹는 두릅나뭇과의 여러해살이풀. 또는 그 뿌리.

translations.definition: A perennial, araliaceous plant and medicinal herb that has edible roots; or its roots.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 느낌이나 인상이 지워지지 않고 오래 기억에 남는 것.

translations.definition: Staying in one's memory for a long time without a certain feeling or impression getting erased.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 세상을 살아가는 일.

translations.definition: The process of a person living in this world.
translations.example: to dedicate one's life to music.

senses.definition_ko: 글자나 글, 그림 등을 종이나 천 등에 기계로 찍어 냄.

translations.definition: The physical act of pressing letters, words, graphics, etc., onto a piece of paper or cloth with a machine.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 분명히 알고 이해함.

translations.definition: An act of knowing and understanding something clearly.

senses.definition_ko: 불쌍한 사람을 살피고 도와주는 마음.

translations.definition: An attitude of care and willingness to help those in need.

senses.definition_ko: 사람들 사이에 맺어지는 관계.

translations.definition: A relationship between people.

senses.definition_ko: 남의 말이나 글을 자신의 말이나 글 속에 끌어 씀.

translations.definition: An act of repeating another person's remark or text in one's own speech or writing.

senses.definition_ko: 모임이나 단체를 이루고 있는 사람들. 또는 그 사람들의 수.

translations.definition: People who constitute a certain party or organization; or the number of such persons.
translations.example: There are not enough people taking part.

senses.definition_ko: 학식과 능력을 갖추어 사회적으로 크게 쓸모가 있는 사람.

translations.definition: A person with knowledge and ability, being highly useful to society.
translations.example: to look for people of remarkable talent.

senses.definition_ko: 남을 생각하고 도와주는 따뜻한 마음.

translations.definition: A warm heart to consider and help others.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것이 확실하다고 여기거나 받아들임.

translations.definition: The act of considering or accepting that something is certain.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 몸.

translations.definition: A body of a human being.

senses.definition_ko: 전 세계의 컴퓨터가 서로 정보를 교환할 수 있도록 연결된 하나의 거대한 컴퓨터 통신망.

translations.definition: A single, large computer network that connects computers around the world to allow them to exchange information.

senses.definition_ko: 물건 값이나 월급, 요금 등을 내림.

translations.definition: An act of lowering the price of goods, wage, fare, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇이 원인이 되다.

translations.definition: To be the cause of something.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물 모양으로 만든 장난감.

translations.definition: A toy made in the form of a person or an animal.
translations.example: to give (someone) a teddy bear as a present.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 이루려고 몸이나 정신을 사용하는 활동. 또는 그 활동의 대상.

translations.definition: An activity that uses one's body or mind in order to achieve something; the object of such an activity.

senses.definition_ko: 날이나 날짜를 세는 단위.

translations.definition: A bound noun that serves as a unit for counting the number of days or referring to a date.

senses.definition_ko: 수를 셀 때 제일 처음 오는 수.

translations.definition: The first number when counting numbers from one.

senses.definition_ko: 여섯에 하나를 더한 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the sum of six and one.

senses.definition_ko: 순서가 일곱 번째인 차례.

translations.definition: The seventh number in a sequence.
translations.example: to be born the seventh of eight children.

senses.definition_ko: 하루 동안에 기온, 기압, 습도 등이 바뀌는 차이.

translations.definition: A range of changes in daily temperature, air pressure, humidity, etc.
translations.example: There is a large daily range (e.g., in temperature).

senses.definition_ko: 날마다 그날그날 겪은 일이나 생각, 느낌 등을 적은 글.

translations.definition: A writing that records one's personal daily experiences, thought, feelings, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 우선 먼저.

translations.definition: First of all.

senses.definition_ko: 어느 지역의 전부.

translations.definition: The whole of a certain area or region.
translations.example: to wander around the whole tourist attraction.

senses.definition_ko: 많은 것 가운데에서 첫째가 되는 등급.

translations.definition: A rank or grade that comes first among many things.
translations.example: to come in first place in the race.

senses.definition_ko: 특별하거나 뛰어나지 않은 평범한 수준. 또는 그런 사람들.

translations.equivalent: the public; being common; being ordinary
translations.definition: An average level, which is not special or extraordinary; people at such a level.

senses.definition_ko: 특정한 신분이나 지위, 특징을 지니지 않은 보통 사람.

translations.definition: A common person who has no specific status, position, or characters.
translations.example: A lecture is held for laypersons.

senses.definition_ko: 아시아 대륙 동쪽에 있는 섬나라. 공업, 전자 산업이 발달하였고 경제 수준이 높다. 주요 언어는 일본어이고 수도는 도쿄이다.

translations.definition: An island country located in East Asia, known for its advanced manufacturing and electronic industries, and high economic standard; the official language is Japanese and the capital is Tokyo.

senses.definition_ko: 일본인이 쓰는 말.

translations.definition: A language that Japanese people speak.

senses.definition_ko: 특별한 일이 없는 보통 때의 생활.

translations.definition: An uneventful, ordinary life.
translations.example: to escape from one's ordinary life.

senses.definition_ko: 한 부분. 또는 전체 중에서 얼마.

translations.definition: One portion of something, or part of the whole.

senses.definition_ko: 태어나서 죽을 때까지 살아있는 동안.

translations.definition: One's lifetime from birth to death.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 생각을 가지고 마음을 써서.

translations.definition: Attentively with a certain thought.
translations.example: to go with the express purpose of cheering.

senses.definition_ko: 돌 한 개를 던져 새 두 마리를 잡는다는 뜻으로, 동시에 두 가지 이익을 얻음.

translations.equivalent: killing two birds with one stone
translations.definition: An act of accomplishing two things with a single action.
translations.example: the effect of killing two birds with one stone.

senses.definition_ko: 한 부분. 또는 전체 중에서 얼마.

translations.definition: One portion of something, or part of the whole.

senses.definition_ko: 일하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who works.

senses.definition_ko: 날마다 반복되는 평범한 생활.

translations.definition: An ordinary life repeated everyday.
translations.example: to be satisfied with one's everyday life.

senses.definition_ko: 날짜와 시간.

translations.definition: A compound word for date and time.
translations.example: to fix the date and time of the gathering.

senses.definition_ko: 돈을 한꺼번에 냄.

translations.definition: The act of paying a sum of money all at once.
translations.example: to pay tuition in one lump-sum.

senses.definition_ko: 앉았다가 서다.

translations.definition: To get up from a sitting or lying position to a standing one.
translations.example: to stand up from one's seat.

senses.definition_ko: 일본 음식.

translations.definition: Ethnic foods that have originated in Japan.

senses.definition_ko: 월요일을 기준으로 한 주의 마지막 날.

translations.definition: The last day of a week starting from Monday.
translations.example: to take a nap on Sunday.

senses.definition_ko: 일본 음식을 파는 가게.

translations.definition: A restaurant that sells Japanese dishes.
translations.example: to eat Japanese food at a Japanese restaurant.

senses.definition_ko: 자신의 몸이나 몸의 일부, 다른 사람을 일어나게 하다.

translations.definition: To make one's body, a part of one's body, or another person stand.

senses.definition_ko: 일본인이 쓰는 말.

translations.definition: A language that Japanese people speak.

senses.definition_ko: 하나씩 하나씩.

translations.definition: One by one.
translations.example: to inspect the tickets one at a time.

senses.definition_ko: 잠에서 깨어나다.

translations.definition: To wake up.
translations.example: to get up early in the morning.

senses.definition_ko: 일터나 직장과 같이 직업으로 삼아 일하는 곳.

translations.definition: An occupation or a place where one is employed like a workplace, an office, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것의 크기, 모양, 범위, 시간 등이 하나로 정해져 있음.

translations.definition: A state in which the size, shape, range, time, etc., of something is fixed.

senses.definition_ko: 정해진 시간보다 빠르게.

translations.definition: Before the specified time.
translations.example: to come to the office early.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 기간 동안 해야 할 일. 또는 그 일을 하기 위해 짜 놓은 계획.

translations.definition: Things that have to be done for a certain period of time; a plan made to do such things.

senses.definition_ko: 평소 시간보다 이르게.

translations.definition: Earlier than usual.

senses.definition_ko: 일정 기간 동안 해야 할 일을 날짜별로 적어 놓은 표.

translations.definition: A list on which things one has to do for a certain period of time are planned by date.

senses.definition_ko: 해가 떠오름.

translations.definition: A state in which the sun goes up.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇의 한 종류. 또는 한 가지.

translations.definition: A kind of something; one thing.
translations.example: Watermelon is a kind of fruit.

senses.definition_ko: 비교되는 대상이 서로 다르지 않고 꼭 같거나 들어맞음.

translations.definition: A state in which things in comparison are not different, either being exactly the same or matching one another.

senses.definition_ko: 월요일부터 일요일까지 칠 일. 또는 한 주일.

translations.definition: Seven days from Monday to Sunday, or one week.
translations.example: It takes a week (to do something).

senses.definition_ko: 함께 길을 가는 사람. 또는 그 무리.

translations.definition: A person who one goes along with, or a group of such persons.
translations.example: to say goodbye to one's companions.

senses.definition_ko: 한 번만 쓰고 버리는 것.

translations.definition: Something that is discarded after one use.

senses.definition_ko: 일을 한 대가로 받는 돈.

translations.definition: A sum of money that one receives for doing work.

senses.definition_ko: 열의 일곱 배가 되는 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the product of seven times ten.
translations.example: to work until the age of seventy.

senses.definition_ko: 맡은 일. 또는 맡겨진 일.

translations.definition: A given work or a task assigned to someone.

senses.definition_ko: 글을 바르게 읽고 이해하는 일. 또는 그런 방법.

translations.definition: An act of reading and understanding a text, or such a method.

senses.definition_ko: 미리 정하지 않고 그때그때 필요에 따라 정한 것.

translations.definition: The quality of being decided according to circumstance, without being decided in advance.
translations.example: A provisional session of the National Assembly is held.

senses.definition_ko: 글이나 글자를 보고 그 음대로 소리를 내어 말로 나타내다.

translations.definition: To see written words or letters, and utter them as they are pronounced.

senses.definition_ko: 아이나 새끼가 배 속에 생김.

translations.definition: The state of bearing a child or young in the womb.

senses.definition_ko: 가지고 있던 물건이 자신도 모르게 없어져 더 이상 가지지 못하게 되다.

translations.definition: To not have something anymore because it has disappeared before one realized it.

senses.definition_ko: 음식을 먹고 소리를 내는 기관으로 입술에서 목구멍까지의 부분.

translations.definition: A bodily organ extending from the lips to the throat that one uses to eat and make sounds.
translations.example: to breathe with one's mouth open.

senses.definition_ko: 안으로 들어갈 수 있는 문이나 통로.

translations.definition: A passage or gate through which one enters a certain place.
translations.example: to reach the entrance to the subway.

senses.definition_ko: 옷을 몸에 걸치거나 두르다.

translations.definition: To hang or drape clothes on or around one's body.

senses.definition_ko: 자기 나라 안으로 들어옴. 또는 다른 나라 안으로 들 어감.

translations.definition: An act of entering one's own country or another country.
translations.example: to go through passport control when entering a country.

senses.definition_ko: 군대에 들어가 군인이 됨.

translations.definition: An act of joining an army and becoming a solider.

senses.definition_ko: 은행과 같은 금융 기관의 계좌에 돈을 넣음.

translations.definition: An act of putting a sum of money into his/her account or other person's account in a financial institution like a bank.
translations.example: to make a passbook for deposits.

senses.definition_ko: 문자나 숫자 등의 정보를 컴퓨터가 기억하게 함.

translations.definition: An act of entering data like words, numbers, etc. and making the computer remember them.

senses.definition_ko: 음식을 먹을 때 입에서 느끼는 맛. 또는 음식을 먹고 싶은 욕구.

translations.definition: The taste that one feels when eating, or the desire to eat.

senses.definition_ko: 회사 등에 일자리를 얻어 들어감.

translations.equivalent: entering a company; joining a company
translations.definition: An act of getting a job with a company, etc. and becoming its employee.
translations.example: a test taken by job applicants.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 입 주위를 둘러싸고 있는 붉고 부드러운 살.

translations.definition: The red and soft flesh that surrounds the opening of the mouth.

senses.definition_ko: 입학하기 위해 치르는 시험.

translations.definition: An examination that one has to take to enter a college, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 병을 고치기 위해 일정 기간 병원에 들어가 지냄.

translations.definition: Staying in a hospital for a certain period of time to have one's disease treated.

senses.definition_ko: 행사나 공연 등이 열리는 장소 안으로 들어감.

translations.definition: Entering the place of an event or performance.

senses.definition_ko: 바로 눈앞에 처하고 있는 처지나 상황. 또는 그런 처지에 대한 태도.

translations.definition: The state or situation one faces at the moment, or the attitude one takes in this position.

senses.definition_ko: 행사나 공연 등이 열리는 장소 안으로 들어가는 것을 허락하는 표.

translations.definition: The ticket whose holder is allowed to enter the place of an event or performance.

senses.definition_ko: 행사나 공연 등이 열리는 장소에 들어가기 위하여 내는 요금.

translations.definition: The fee paid to enter the place of an event or performance.

senses.definition_ko: 학생이 되어 공부하기 위해 학교에 들어감.

translations.equivalent: admission to a school; entrance into a school
translations.definition: Starting to go to a school as a new student.
translations.example: to congratulate (someone) on their admission to a school.

entry.visual_material: Illustration of an entrance ceremony at an elementary school with students holding flowers and a banner saying 'Congratulations on your enrollment'.

senses.definition_ko: 학교에서 새로 입학하는 학생들을 모아 놓고 하는 의식.

translations.definition: The ceremony for new students who first go to a school.
translations.example: to begin the starting ceremony at a school.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물에게 옷을 걸치거나 몸에 두르게 하다.

translations.definition: To make a person or animal wear or hang clothes over his/her or its body.

senses.definition_ko: 실, 끈, 조각 등의 두 끝을 매거나 붙여서 하나로 만들거나 물건 등을 맞대어 붙이다.

translations.definition: To tie or glue two strings, cords, pieces, etc., together, or put things, etc., into contact.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 물체가 다른 물체의 뒤를 이어 따르다.

translations.definition: For one object to follow another.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물이 어느 곳에 떠나거나 벗어나지 않고 머물다.

translations.definition: For a person or animal to remain in a certain place without leaving or getting out of it.

senses.definition_ko: 사람, 동물, 물체 등이 존재하는 상태이다.

translations.definition: A person, an animal, an object, etc., being in existence.
translations.example: There are desks in the classroom.

senses.definition_ko: 한번 알았던 것을 기억하지 못하거나 기억해 내지 못하다.

translations.definition: To not remember or fail to remember something that one knew once.

senses.definition_ko: 줄기 끝이나 둘레에 붙어 있으며 녹색의 납작한 모양을 한, 식물의 영양 기관.

translations.definition: A vegetative organ of a plant, which is green, flat, and attached to the tip point or sides of a stem.

senses.definition_ko: 눈금이 그려져 있는, 길이를 재는 데 쓰는 도구.

translations.definition: A stationery item with scales printed on it, used to measure length.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 자격을 인정하는 증서.

translations.definition: A document proving that its holder is qualified.

senses.definition_ko: 남에게 어떤 행동을 권유하거나 재촉할 때에 하는 말.

translations.definition: An exclamation uttered when the speaker asks or urges someone to do something.

senses.definition_ko: 어떠한 작용을 주어 감각이나 마음에 반응을 일으키게 함. 또는 그런 사물.

translations.definition: The act of causing one's sense or heart to react with a stimulus, or such an agent.

senses.definition_ko: 말을 적는 기호.
senses.example_ko: 자기 이름에 쓰는 한자가 무슨 자인지 모른다.

translations.definition: A sign used to write down a spoken word.
translations.example: to not know which Chinese characters are used in one's name.

senses.definition_ko: 그 사람 자신.

translations.definition: The person himself/herself.

senses.definition_ko: 영업을 위한 것이 아니라 개인인 또는 개인의 가정에서 쓰이는 자동차.

translations.definition: A car that is used by an individual or his/her family, not for business.
translations.example: to go to work in one's personal car.

senses.definition_ko: 처음 만난 사람에게 자기의 이름, 직업, 취미 등을 말하여 알림.

translations.definition: Giving personal information to someone new, such as a name, job, hobby, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 신분이나 지위.

translations.definition: A certain status or position.

senses.definition_ko: 여러 번 계속하여.

translations.definition: Several times.

senses.definition_ko: 부모가 키우고 있는 아들이나 딸. 또는 아들과 딸.

translations.definition: A son or a daughter or a son and a daughter collectively, raised by parents or a parent.

senses.definition_ko: 눈을 감고 몸과 정신의 활동을 멈추고 한동안 쉬는 상태가 되다.

translations.definition: To be in the state of taking a rest for a period of time with one's eyes closed and mental activities suspended.

senses.definition_ko: 기계 등이 일정한 장치에 의해 스스로 작동함.

translations.definition: The act of a machine, etc., operating by itself by a certain device.

translations.definition: In actual truth without falsehood.
