translations.definition: A subject or problem to which people pay attention.
translations.example: to get away from the focus of the discussion.

senses.definition_ko: 답답하거나 안타깝거나 걱정이 되어 마음이 조마조마함.

translations.definition: One's feeling of uneasiness because one is frustrated, sorry, or worried.
translations.example: Uneasiness and nervousness are seen in (someone's) eyes.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사람을 손님으로 부름.

translations.definition: An act of asking someone to come to a place as a guest.

senses.definition_ko: 초청하는 내용을 적은 것.

translations.definition: Something written on which invites someone to something.

senses.definition_ko: 코코아 가루에 우유, 설탕 등을 섞어 만든, 주로 검은색의 달콤한 음식.

translations.definition: Sweet, mostly dark-colored food, that is made by mixing cocoa powder, milk, sugar, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 태도나 취향이 세련되지 못하고 시골 사람 같다.

translations.definition: One's attitude or taste being unsophisticated and looking like that of a country person.

senses.definition_ko: 화약의 힘으로 총알을 발사하는 무기.

translations.definition: A weapon that fires bullets, using the power of gunpowder.

senses.definition_ko: 수량이 모두 합하여 몇임을 나타내는 말.

translations.definition: The word used to indicate the total number of something.

senses.definition_ko: 대통령을 보좌하고 국가적인 사무를 총괄하는, 장관들의 우두머리가 되는 공무원.

translations.definition: A civil servant who is the head of ministers, assists the president, and manages national matters.

senses.definition_ko: 사람, 사물, 풍경 등을 사진이나 영화로 찍음.

translations.definition: An act of shooting people, objects, scenes, etc., as a photograph or movie.

senses.definition_ko: 정도가 가장 높음.

translations.definition: The degree of something being the highest.

senses.definition_ko: 수나 정도가 가장 작거나 낮음.

translations.definition: The state of a number or degree of something being the least or lowest.
translations.example: A minimum of five people are needed.

senses.definition_ko: 얼마 되지 않은 지나간 날부터 현재까지의 기간.

translations.definition: The period from a past date, not long ago, to the present date.

senses.definition_ko: 가장 적게 잡아도. 또는 일정한 조건에서 가능한 한 가장 적게.

translations.definition: At a minimum, or as little as possible under a certain condition.
translations.example: It takes at least 30 minutes to get to school.

senses.definition_ko: 수나 양, 크기 등이 가장 큼.

translations.definition: The state of a number, quantity, size, etc., of something being the highest, most, or largest.
translations.example: to increase output to the maximum.

senses.definition_ko: 가장 새로움. 또는 가장 앞서 있음.

translations.definition: Being the newest, or the most advanced.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 조건에서 가능한 한 가장 많이.

translations.equivalent: as much as possible; to the maximum
translations.definition: As much as possible under a certain condition.
translations.example: to work as hard as one can.

senses.definition_ko: 정도나 수준이 가장 낮음.

translations.definition: The degree or level of something being the lowest.

senses.definition_ko: 모든 정성과 힘.

translations.definition: All one's heart and power.

senses.definition_ko: 맨 나중.

translations.definition: An order that comes last.

senses.definition_ko: 맨 처음.

translations.definition: The first of its kind.
translations.example: to be the first to discover (something).

senses.definition_ko: 나중에 더 보탬.

translations.definition: The act of adding something later.

senses.definition_ko: 춤 동작을 하다.

translations.definition: To perform the movements of a dance.

senses.definition_ko: 한국의 명절의 하나. 음력 팔월 십오 일로 햅쌀로 빚은 송편과 햇과일 등의 음식을 장만하여 차례를 지낸다. 또한 씨름, 줄다리기, 강강술래 등의 민속놀이를 즐긴다.

translations.definition: One of traditional Korean holiday; it falls on August 15th by the lunar calendar; on this day, people prepare special foods like songpyeon, half-moon rice cakes, and newly harvested fruits, and hold a memorial service for their ancestors; they also enjoy a variety of folk games and plays such as ssireum, a traditional wrestling, juldarigi, tug-of-war, and ganggangsullae, a traditional circle dance.

senses.definition_ko: 지나간 일을 생각함. 또는 그런 생각이나 일.

translations.definition: The act of looking back on a past incident, or such a thought or the incident itself.

senses.definition_ko: 주로 겨울철의 추운 기운이나 추운 날씨.

translations.definition: Cold air or cold weather, mostly in winter.
translations.example: to be sensitive to the cold.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 목적을 위해서 일을 밀고 나아감.

translations.definition: The act of proceeding with a project for a certain purpose.
translations.example: to push ahead on a project.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 조건에 알맞은 사람이나 물건을 책임지고 소개함.

translations.definition: An act of responsibly introducing someone or something that meets a certain condition.

senses.definition_ko: 축구 경기를 하는 운동장.

translations.definition: A field where soccer games are played.
translations.example: to play soccer on the soccer field.

senses.definition_ko: 추천하는 내용을 적은 글.

translations.definition: A piece of writing that recommends someone for a certain position.

senses.definition_ko: 수량, 부피, 규모 등을 줄여서 작게 함.

translations.definition: The act of making the number, volume, size, etc., smaller.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사실이나 보이는 것을 통해서 다른 무엇을 미리 어림짐작함.

translations.definition: The state of making a guess based on a certain fact or what is seen.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것을 기념하거나 축하하기 위하여 벌이는 큰 규모의 행사.

translations.definition: A large-scale event to commemorate or celebrate something.

senses.definition_ko: 열한 명이 한 팀이 되어 주로 발이나 머리를 사용하여 상대편의 골에 공을 많이 넣으면 이기는 경기.

translations.definition: A sport in which eleven players form a team, who can win the game by shooting more goals into the other team's net, using mostly their feet or heads.

senses.definition_ko: 남의 좋은 일에 대하여 기쁜 마음으로 인사함. 또는 그런 인사.

translations.definition: An act of greeting someone with pleasure, commenting on his/her happy occasion, achievement, etc., or such a greeting.
translations.example: to hold a party in celebration (of something).

senses.definition_ko: 축구 경기에 쓰는 공.

translations.definition: The ball used in a soccer game.

senses.definition_ko: 밖으로 나갈 수 있는 문이나 통로.

translations.definition: A door or passage leading to the outside.

senses.definition_ko: 국경을 넘어 다른 나라로 나감.

translations.definition: The act of crossing a national border and going to another country.
translations.example: to go through passport control when leaving a country.

senses.definition_ko: 일하러 직장에 나가거나 나옴.

translations.equivalent: going to work; arriving at work
translations.definition: The act of leaving home for a workplace or arriving at a workplace, to work.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 곳을 향하여 길을 떠남.

translations.definition: The act of leaving a place, heading for another place.

senses.definition_ko: 아이를 낳음.

translations.definition: To give birth to a child.

senses.definition_ko: 수업이나 모임 등에 나아가 참석함.

translations.definition: The act of going to a class, meeting, etc., and being there.

senses.definition_ko: 지역, 학교, 직업 등에 의해 정해지는 사회적 신분이나 이력.

translations.definition: One's social status or history, decided by the region, school, job, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 무대나 영화, 방송 등에 나와 연기나 연주를 함.

translations.definition: The act of appearing on a stage, in a movie, in a television show, etc., and acting a role or playing a musical instrument.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 어떤 곳을 드나듦.

translations.definition: The act of someone going in and out of a certain place.

senses.definition_ko: 임시로 다른 곳에 일하러 감.

translations.definition: The act of temporarily going to another site to work.
translations.example: to go on a business trip.

senses.definition_ko: 출근과 퇴근.

translations.definition: The act of going to work or leaving work.

senses.definition_ko: 대기의 온도가 낮다.

translations.definition: (temperature) Low.

senses.definition_ko: 글, 그림, 악보 등을 책으로 만들어 세상에 내놓음.

translations.definition: The act of making pieces of writing, painting, music, etc., into a book or collection and releasing them in public.

senses.definition_ko: 물체에 급격히 가하여지는 힘.

translations.definition: The force suddenly exerted on an object.

senses.definition_ko: 없었거나 숨겨져 있던 사물이나 현상이 나타남.

translations.definition: The state of a non-existing or hidden object or phenomenon appearing.

senses.definition_ko: 남의 허물이나 잘못을 진심으로 타이름. 또는 그런 말.

translations.definition: The act of talking sincerely to someone to correct his/her fault or mistake, or such a remark.

senses.definition_ko: 음악이나 규칙적인 박자에 맞춰 몸을 움직이는 것.

translations.definition: An act of moving one's body to music or a regular beat.

senses.definition_ko: 서로 세게 맞부딪치거나 맞섬.

translations.definition: The act of colliding with or confronting each other.

senses.definition_ko: 음악이나 규칙적인 박자에 맞추어 몸을 움직이다.

translations.definition: To move one's body to a piece of music or a regular beat.

senses.definition_ko: 모자라지 않고 넉넉하다.

translations.definition: Being ample, without shortage.

senses.definition_ko: 모자라지 않고 넉넉하게.

translations.definition: In an an ample quantity, without shortage.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 직업을 얻어 직장에 나감.

translations.definition: The state of obtaining a job and going to work.
translations.example: to prepare for getting a job.

entry.visual_material: Illustration shows people engaged in various hobbies: baking bread, fishing, listening to music, reading, and cycling.

senses.definition_ko: 좋아하여 재미로 즐겨서 하는 일.

translations.definition: Something one likes and enjoys doing for fun.

senses.definition_ko: 신문이나 잡지의 기사나 작품의 재료를 조사하여 얻음.

translations.definition: An act of examining and obtaining material for a story for a newspaper or a magazine or a written work.

senses.definition_ko: 이미 발표한 것을 거두어들이거나 약속한 것 또는 예정된 일을 없앰.

translations.definition: The act of taking back what had been announced, or revoking what had been promised or planned.
translations.example: An increasing number of reservations are being canceled.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 직업을 얻어 직장에 나감.

translations.definition: The act of finding a job and starting to work at a workplace.
translations.example: To land a job; to get a job.

senses.definition_ko: 술이나 약 등의 기운으로 정신이 흐려지고 몸을 제대로 움직일 수 없게 되다.

translations.definition: To be unable to think or move properly, due to the effect of alcoholic drinks, medicine, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것에 대하여 좋아하거나 즐겨서 쏠리는 마음.

translations.definition: One's preference for something, because one likes it or enjoys doing it.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 쪽과 상대하여, 어떤 무리의 한쪽.

translations.definition: A bound noun indicating one of two groups, when dealing with the other.

senses.definition_ko: 앞뒤를 기준으로 왼쪽이나 오른쪽의 면.

translations.definition: The left or right face of something when looking at it from in front or from behind.

senses.definition_ko: 건물의 같은 높이에 있는 부분을 아래에서 위로 차례를 매겨 세는 단위.

translations.definition: A unit used to count the area on the same floor of a building, numbered from bottom to the top.
translations.example: to live on the third floor.

senses.definition_ko: 이와 더불어 잇몸 등의 지지 조직, 구강 등의 질병을 치료하는 의학 분야. 또는 그 분야의 병원.

translations.definition: A field of medical science that treats diseases of teeth, supporting tissue such as gum, mouth, etc., or the department of the hospital that is in charge of the field.

senses.definition_ko: 바람이 세차게 불거나 비나 눈 등이 세차게 오다.

translations.definition: For a wind to blow hard; or for rain, snow, etc., to fall hard.

senses.definition_ko: 손이나 다른 물건이 무엇에 세게 부딪치게 하다.

translations.definition: To cause the hand or an object to bump hard against something.
translations.example: to hit the ball with the bat.

senses.definition_ko: 붓이나 연필 등으로 점을 찍거나 선이나 그림을 그리다.

translations.definition: To mark a dot, draw a line, or draw something with a writing brush, pencil, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 적은 분량의 액체를 붓거나 가루 등을 뿌려서 넣다.

translations.definition: To pour a small amount of liquid in something, or to sprinkle powder, etc., on something.
translations.example: to add some pepper to the soup.

senses.definition_ko: 병이나 상처 등을 낫게 함.

translations.definition: The act of treating a disease or wound.

senses.definition_ko: 허리부터 다리 부분까지 하나로 이어져 가랑이가 없는 아래옷.

translations.definition: A lower garment running from the waist to the legs that is not separated at the crotch.

senses.definition_ko: 병이나 상처를 낫게 하는 방법.

translations.definition: A method of treating a disease or wound.

senses.definition_ko: 주어야 할 돈을 내주다.

translations.definition: To give out the money one is expected to pay.

senses.definition_ko: 옷, 신발, 몸의 일부분 등의 길이를 잰 값.

translations.definition: The value obtained by measuring the lengths of a piece of clothing, a shoe, or a part of one's body, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 이를 닦는 데 쓰는 약.

translations.definition: Substance that is used to brush one's teeth.

senses.definition_ko: 물건을 다른 데로 옮기다.

translations.definition: To move an object to another place.
translations.example: to move items one is not using.

senses.definition_ko: 우유에서 단백질이 많은 성분을 뽑아내고 굳혀서 발효시킨 음식.

translations.definition: Food that is made by taking out the substance rich in protein from milk and drying and fermenting it.

senses.definition_ko: 토막을 낸 닭에 밀가루 등을 묻혀 기름에 튀기거나 구운 음식.

translations.definition: A dish made by coating chopped chicken with flour, and frying or baking it.

senses.definition_ko: 사이가 가까워 서로 친하게 지내는 사람.

translations.definition: A person that one is close to and in an amicable relationship with.

senses.definition_ko: 사람을 대하는 태도가 상냥하고 부드러움. 또는 그런 태도.

translations.definition: The state of treating someone gently and in a friendly manner, or such an attitude.

senses.definition_ko: 결혼한 여자가 본래 살던, 그 가족들이 사는 집.

translations.equivalent: the former home of a married woman
translations.definition: The house a woman lived in before her wedding, where her parents and siblings live.

senses.definition_ko: 부모나 배우자와 혈연관계가 있는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who is related by blood to one's parents or spouse.
translations.example: Relatives gather on the national holiday.

senses.definition_ko: 가까이 사귀어 서로 잘 알고 정이 두텁다.

translations.definition: Being on good terms with someone one knows well and feels close to.
translations.example: to be close to a junior colleague/younger student.

senses.definition_ko: 육에 일을 더한 수.
senses.example_ko: 그 사람을 만난지 칠 년이 된다.

translations.definition: The number that is the sum of six and one.
translations.example: It has been seven years since (I) met that person.

senses.definition_ko: 아무 말 없이 조용히 있음. 또는 그런 상태.

translations.definition: The act of staying still without saying a word, or such state.

senses.definition_ko: 십의 일곱 배가 되는 수.
senses.example_ko: 그 영화를 칠십 번 이상 보다.

translations.definition: The number that is the product of seven times ten.
translations.example: to watch that movie more than seventy times.

senses.definition_ko: 집에서 주로 잠을 자는 방.

translations.definition: A room in one's home, where one usually sleeps.

senses.definition_ko: 분필로 글씨를 쓰는 짙은 초록색이나 검정색의 판.

translations.definition: A board, usually dark green or black, on which one writes with chalk.

senses.definition_ko: 이를 닦는 데 쓰는 솔.

translations.definition: A brush that is used to clean one's teeth.
translations.example: to squeeze out toothpaste onto a toothbrush.

senses.definition_ko: 소화를 돕고 입 안이 마르지 않게 입 안에 생기는 물.

translations.definition: A liquid formed in the mouth to help digestion and keep the inside of the mouth from becoming dry.

senses.definition_ko: 좋은 점이나 잘한 일 등을 매우 훌륭하게 여기는 마음을 말로 나타냄. 또는 그런 말.

translations.definition: An act of expressing one's appreciation of someone's strength or achievement, etc., or such a remark.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 누워서 잘 수 있게 만든 가구.

translations.definition: A piece of furniture that is made for someone to lie down and sleep on.

senses.definition_ko: 특별한 날을 기념하거나 인사를 전하기 위해 그림이나 장식, 글 등을 인쇄한 종이.

translations.definition: A piece of paper on which an image, decoration, message, etc., is printed, to celebrate a special day or greet someone.

senses.definition_ko: 고기와 감자, 양파 등의 채소를 볶다가 카레 가루를 섞어서 끓인 다음 밥에 얹어 먹는 인도식 요리.

translations.definition: An Indian dish made by boiling a mixture of curry powder and stir-fried meat and vegetables such as potatoes, onions, etc., served over rice.

senses.definition_ko: 사진을 찍는 기계.

translations.definition: A device used to take photographs.
translations.example: to take a picture of a lovely landscape with a camera.

senses.definition_ko: 주로 커피와 차, 가벼운 간식거리 등을 파는 가게.

translations.definition: A shop where coffee, tea, light snacks, etc., are sold.
translations.example: to meet a friend at a café.

senses.definition_ko: 건물, 기차 안, 책장 등을 용도에 따라 일정한 크기나 모양으로 나누어 둘러 막은 공간.

translations.definition: A space in a regular size or form, in a bigger space or structure such as a building, train, bookshelf, etc., which is divided and enclosed to serve a certain purpose.
translations.example: the cars at the front of the train.

senses.definition_ko: 물건을 베거나 깎거나 써는 데 쓰는 도구.

translations.definition: A tool that is used to cut, peel or chop something.
translations.example: to peel fruit with a knife.

senses.definition_ko: 밀가루 반죽을 얇게 밀고 칼로 가늘게 썰어서 만든 국수. 또는 그것을 넣어 끓인 음식.

translations.definition: A Korean noodle made by flattening the dough as thin as possible and cutting it into long strips with a knife; or a soup made by boiling them with other ingredients in a broth.

senses.definition_ko: 잘 보이지 않을 정도로 매우 어둡다.

translations.definition: So dark that nothing is visible.
translations.example: When night comes, it is very dark outside.

senses.definition_ko: 아주 크다.

translations.definition: Very big.

senses.definition_ko: 크게 되다.

translations.definition: To grow big.

senses.definition_ko: 머리카락을 자르는 일. 또는 그 머리 모양.

translations.definition: An act of cutting one's hair, or such a hairstyle.

senses.definition_ko: 창이나 문을 가릴 수 있도록 그 위에 매달아 길게 늘어뜨린 천.

translations.definition: A long, draped cloth, hanging over a window or door, to hide it.

senses.definition_ko: 독특한 향기가 나고 카페인이 들어 있으며 약간 쓴, 커피나무의 열매로 만든 진한 갈색의 차.

translations.definition: Thick, brown, aromatic brew, tasting a little bitter and containing caffeine, which is made of the fruits of a coffee tree.

entry.visual_material: An illustration depicting a coffee shop scene with two women at the counter and two people sitting at a table with coffee and juice.

senses.definition_ko: 사람들이 주로 커피나 차를 마시며 이야기하거나 쉴 수 있도록 꾸며 놓은 가게.

translations.definition: A shop designed for customers to talk or rest, usually while drinking coffee or tea.
translations.example: to meet at a coffee shop.

senses.definition_ko: 전자 회로를 이용하여 문서, 사진, 영상 등의 대량의 데이터를 빠르고 정확하게 처리하는 기계.

translations.definition: A machine made from electronic circuits that quickly and accurately processes mass data such as documents, photographs, videos, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 현악기의 줄을 활로 문질러 소리를 내다.

translations.definition: To make a sound by rubbing the strings of a string instrument with a bow.

senses.definition_ko: 물이나 음료를 담는 그릇.

translations.definition: A glass to pour water or a beverage into.
translations.example: to pour milk into a cup.

senses.definition_ko: 신발, 양말, 장갑 등 짝이 되는 두 개를 한 벌로 세는 단위.

translations.definition: A bound noun serving as a unit to count two pieces of something such as shoes, socks, gloves, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 밀가루에 달걀, 버터, 우유, 설탕 등을 넣어 반죽하여 오븐에 구운 뒤 생크림이나 과일 등으로 장식한 빵.

translations.definition: Bread made by mixing flour, eggs, butter, milk, sugar, etc., making the mixture as a dough, baking the dough in an oven, then decorating the baked bread with cream, fruits, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 숨을 쉬고 냄새를 맡는 몸의 한 부분.

translations.definition: The body part that is used for breathing and smelling.

senses.definition_ko: 매우 긴 코와 두 개의 큰 어금니가 있는, 육지에 사는 동물 가운데 가장 큰 동물.

translations.definition: The largest animal living on land that has a very long nose and two large tusks.
translations.example: to watch the elephants (e.g., at the zoo).

senses.definition_ko: 전기 제품 등을 작동하게 만들다.

translations.definition: To make an electric appliance, etc., start working.

senses.definition_ko: 구석이나 길의 모퉁이.

translations.definition: A hook or turn of a road.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 목적에 따라 정해진 길.

translations.definition: A route fixed to serve a certain purpose.

senses.definition_ko: 악기를 연주하거나 노래를 하여 청중에게 들려주는 모임.

translations.definition: A gathering organized so that people can listen to songs or music being sung or played live.

senses.definition_ko: 추위를 막기 위해 겉에 입는 옷.

translations.definition: An outer garment that one wears over other clothes to protect oneself from the cold.

senses.definition_ko: 가슴 속에서 계속해서 울려 나오는 기침 소리.

translations.definition: A word imitating repeated coughing sounds from deep in one's chest.

senses.definition_ko: 콧구멍 밖으로 흘러나오는 피.

translations.definition: Blood that flows from the nostrils.

senses.definition_ko: 입은 다물고 코로 소리를 내어 부르는 노래.

translations.definition: A song sung by making nasal sounds, with one's mouth shut.

senses.definition_ko: 객실에 취사 도구를 비롯한 기본적인 살림살이를 갖추고 있으며, 객실 단위로 분양하여 운영하는 형태의 호텔.

translations.definition: A hotel whose units are equipped with basic household items such as cookware, and which is run by selling memberships for the units.
translations.example: to book a room at a membership resort.

senses.definition_ko: 콧구멍에서 나오는 끈끈한 액체.

translations.definition: The sticky liquid, or snot, excreted from the nostrils.

senses.definition_ko: 두부나 된장 등의 재료로 쓰이며 노란색 또는 검은색의 얇은 껍질에 싸인 동그란 모양의 곡식.

translations.definition: A round grain with a thin, yellow or black skin that is used as an ingredient in tofu, soy bean paste, etc.

entry.visual_material: Illustration of bean sprouts in a pot

senses.definition_ko: 노랗고 둥근 콩을 싹을 틔워서 그늘에 두고 물을 주어 뿌리가 자라게 한 식물. 또는 그것으로 만든 나물.

translations.definition: A plant grown by sprouting yellow and round beans, and placing and watering the sprouted beans in the shade until the roots grow long; or a herbal dish made from the sprouts.

senses.definition_ko: 기분이 상쾌하고 아주 좋다.

translations.definition: One's feeling being refreshed and good.

senses.definition_ko: 깊이 잠들어서 숨을 크게 쉬는 소리. 또는 그 모양.

translations.definition: A word imitating the sound made when one makes a loud, breathing sound in deep sleep, or describing such a scene.

senses.definition_ko: 크고 무거운 물건이 바닥이나 다른 물체에 떨어지거나 부딪쳐 나는 소리.

translations.definition: A word imitating the sound made when a big and heavy object falls on the ground or on another object.

senses.definition_ko: 사물의 부피, 넓이, 양 등이 큰 정도.

translations.definition: A degree of how big a volume, area, length, height, etc., of an object is.

senses.definition_ko: 동식물이 자라다.

translations.definition: For an animal or plant to grow.
translations.example: (You) are getting so tall (I) can hardly recognize (you).

senses.definition_ko: 길이, 넓이, 높이, 부피 등이 보통 정도를 넘다.

translations.definition: A length, width, height, volume, etc., exceeding an ordinary degree.

senses.definition_ko: 버터, 아이스크림 등의 원료나 조리에 사용하는, 우유에서 얻는 하얀 기름.

translations.definition: White oil obtained from milk, used as the base material of butter, ice cream, etc., or used in cooking.

senses.definition_ko: 크고 넓은 길.

translations.definition: A big and spacious road.

senses.definition_ko: 많은 돈.

translations.definition: A large amount of money.
translations.example: to save up a large amount of money.

senses.definition_ko: 서양의 전통적인 작곡법과 연주법에 의한 음악.

translations.definition: Music that depends on the traditional composition and performance methods of the west.

senses.definition_ko: 아버지의 형을 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to refer to or address a brother of one's father.
translations.example: Everyone gathers at one's uncle's house.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물이 바로 섰을 때의 발에서부터 머리까지의 몸의 길이.

translations.definition: The length of a person or animal in an upright position that is measured from the feet to the head.

senses.definition_ko: 아버지의 형의 아내를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to refer to or address the wife of one's father's elder brother.
translations.example: to learn to cook from one's aunt.

senses.definition_ko: 문이나 자물쇠를 잠그거나 여는 도구.

translations.definition: An implement that is used to lock or unlock a door or lock.
translations.example: to open the door with a key.

senses.definition_ko: 다루는 데 힘이 많이 들고 중요한 일.

translations.definition: A hard-to-handle, important task.

senses.definition_ko: 동식물을 보살펴 자라게 하다.

translations.definition: To take care of an animal or plant so that it grows.

senses.definition_ko: 큰아버지와 그 가족들이 사는 집.

translations.definition: The house where one's big uncle and his family live.
translations.example: to go to the house of the eldest brother of one's father.

senses.definition_ko: 성격이나 재능, 운명 등을 태어날 때부터 지니고 나다.

translations.definition: To be born with a personality, talent, fate, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 탈것이나 탈것으로 이용하는 짐승의 몸 위에 오르다.

translations.definition: To mount a vehicle or the body of an animal used as a vehicle.

senses.definition_ko: 불씨나 높은 열로 불꽃이 일어나거나 불이 붙어 번지다.

translations.definition: For a fire to be ignited or spread, due to embers or heat.

senses.definition_ko: 많은 양의 액체에 적은 양의 액체나 가루를 넣어 섞다.

translations.definition: To put a small amount of liquid or powder into a large amount of liquid, and to mix it.

senses.definition_ko: 몫이나 상으로 주는 돈이나 물건을 받다.

translations.definition: To receive money or an object as one's share or as a prize.
translations.example: to receive one's pay for the month.

senses.definition_ko: 때나 먼지가 쉽게 달라붙다.

translations.definition: For something to be easily attached to by stains or dirt.

senses.definition_ko: 불이 붙어 타기 시작하다.

translations.definition: For fire to start burning.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 사람.

translations.definition: A person who is not oneself.
translations.example: to think about another person's perspective.

senses.definition_ko: 네모난 테이블 가운데에 네트를 세우고, 공을 라켓으로 쳐서 넘기고 받는 실내 경기.

translations.definition: An indoor sport in which players hit a ball with paddles over a net installed in the middle of a rectangular table.
translations.example: to play table tennis with a friend.

senses.definition_ko: 떠받치는 다리가 있고 위가 평평해서 물건을 올려놓을 수 있는 책상 모양의 가구.

translations.definition: A piece of furniture with a flat top and supporting legs, like a desk, which is used to put objects on.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 태어남.

translations.definition: Someone having been born.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 상황이나 구속 등에서 빠져나옴.

translations.definition: An act of getting out of a certain situation, confinement, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 불교에서, 석가모니의 유골을 모시거나 공덕을 기리기 위하여 세우는, 주로 여러 층으로 된 뾰족한 건축물.

translations.definition: In Buddhism, a pointed architectural structure usually in multiple layers, built to hold the Buddha's remains or to pay tribute to his charitable deeds.

senses.definition_ko: 비행기나 배, 차 등에 올라탐.

translations.definition: An act of getting on an airplane, ship, bus, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 비행기나 배, 차 등에 탄 손님.

translations.definition: A guest who is on board an airplane, ship, car, etc.
translations.example: a passenger on an international flight.

entry.visual_material: A plate of sweet and sour pork (탕수육).

senses.definition_ko: 튀김옷을 입혀 튀긴 고기에 식초, 간장, 설탕, 채소 등을 넣고 끓인 녹말 물을 부어 만든 중국 요리.

translations.definition: A Chinese dish made by frying flour-coated meat, and pouring a boiled mixture of vinegar, soybean sauce, sugar, vegetables, etc., over the meat.
translations.example: to eat sweet and sour pork.

senses.definition_ko: 동남아시아의 인도차이나반도에 있는 나라. ‘타이’를 한국식 한자음으로 읽은 이름이다.

translations.definition: A country located in the Indochinese Peninsula of Southeastern Asia; it’s the Korean pronunciation for the Chinese characters for ‘타이(Thai)’.

entry.visual_material: Two individuals practicing martial arts, labeled '태권도' (Taekwondo) and '유도' (Judo).

senses.definition_ko: 한국 전통 무술에 바탕을 둔, 손과 발 등을 사용해 차기, 지르기, 막기 등의 기술로 공격과 방어를 하는 운동.

translations.definition: Sport based on a traditional Korean martial arts, characterized by using hands and feet to perform an array of attacking or defending moves such as kicking, punching, blocking, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 대한민국의 국기.

translations.definition: The national flag of the Republic of Korea.
translations.example: to hang up the taegeukgi (Korean flag).

senses.definition_ko: 몸을 움직이거나 어떤 일을 대하는 마음이 드러난 자세.

translations.definition: One’s manner of moving one’s body or dealing with a certain incident.
translations.example: to have a good attitude in class.

senses.definition_ko: 태양계의 중심에 있으며 온도가 매우 높고 스스로 빛을 내는 항성.

translations.definition: The star at the center of a solar system which is extremely hot and emits light.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물 등이 형태를 갖추어 어미의 몸 밖으로 나오다.

translations.definition: For a person, animal, etc., to take form and come out of the mother's body.

senses.definition_ko: 차나 배와 같은 탈것이나 짐승의 등에 타게 하다.

translations.definition: To have someone mount a vehicle such as a car or ship or the back of an animal.
translations.example: to give (someone) a ride in a car.

entry.visual_material: An illustration of a person with an umbrella battling strong winds and rain.

senses.definition_ko: 주로 7~9월에 태평양에서 한국, 일본 등 아시아 대륙 동부로 불어오는, 거센 폭풍우를 동반한 바람.

translations.definition: The fierce wind accompanying a rainstorm, blown from the Pacific Ocean to the eastern part of the Asian continent such as Korea, Japan, etc., usually between July and September.

entry.visual_material: Illustrations of a taxi, motorbike, bus, and train.

senses.definition_ko: 돈을 받고 손님이 원하는 곳까지 태워 주는 일을 하는 승용차.

translations.definition: A car that takes a passenger to a requested destination for money.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿 가운데서 고르다.

translations.definition: To pick one thing among many things.

senses.definition_ko: 우편물이나 짐, 상품 등을 원하는 장소까지 직접 배달해 주는 일.

translations.definition: An act of delivering a mail, package, goods, etc., to a requested destination, in person.
translations.example: to send (a packaged item) by courier.

senses.definition_ko: 산, 바다, 강 등의 밑을 뚫어서 기차나 자동차가 지나 다닐 수 있게 만든 통로.

translations.definition: A road that is made through a mountain or under a sea, river, etc., so that trains or cars can pass through.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 둘러싸고 있는 표면을 눌러서 터지게 하다.

translations.definition: To press the surface surrounding something and make it burst open.

senses.definition_ko: 비행기나 기차, 버스 등의 여러 노선이 모여 있는, 주로 첫 번째나 마지막 역.

translations.definition: A place, usually the first or last stop, where the many routes of airplanes, trains, buses, etc., start or end.

senses.definition_ko: 둘러싸여 막혔던 것이 무너지거나 뚫리다.

translations.definition: For an object surrounded and blocked by something to be broken down or pierced.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 얼굴에서 입 아래의 뾰족하게 나온 부분.

translations.definition: The protruding part of a face, below the mouth.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물의 피부에 나는 가느다란 실 모양의 것.

translations.definition: A fine, thread-like thing growing on the skin of a person or animal.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것에 달려 있거나 붙어 있는 것을 떼어 내기 위해 흔들거나 치다.

translations.definition: To shake or beat something to remove a clinging or stuck thing.

senses.definition_ko: 큰 것의 속이 아무것도 없이 빈 모양.

translations.definition: In a state with nothing inside a big object.

senses.definition_ko: 가운데에 네트를 치고 양쪽에서 라켓으로 공을 주고받아 승부를 겨루는 운동 경기.

translations.definition: A sports game in which players compete as they send and receive a ball over a net installed in the center, using rackets.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 지능이나 능력, 제품의 성능 등을 알아보기 위하여 시험하거나 검사함. 또는 그런 시험이나 검사.

translations.definition: An act of testing or examining one's IQ, one's competency, the performance of a product, etc., or such a test or examination.

senses.definition_ko: 방송국에서 전파로 보내오는 영상과 소리를 받아서 보여 주는 기계.

translations.definition: A machine that delivers the images and sound that were sent in waves by a broadcasting station.

entry.visual_material: Various animals illustration (rabbit, puppy, cat, horse, cow, pig)

senses.definition_ko: 귀가 길고 뒷다리가 앞다리보다 발달하였으며 꼬리는 짧은 동물.

translations.definition: An animal with long ears and a short tail whose hind legs are more developed than its front legs.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 문제에 대하여 여러 사람이 옳고 그름을 따지며 논의함.

translations.definition: A debate by many people about an issue, while judging what is right and wrong.

senses.definition_ko: 둥근 모양에 크기는 주먹만 하며 초록색이었다가 붉은색으로 익는 열매.

translations.definition: A round, fist-sized fruit that turns from green to red when ripe.

senses.definition_ko: 월요일을 기준으로 한 주의 여섯째 날.

translations.definition: The sixth day of a week starting from Monday.
translations.example: to meet a friend on Saturday.

senses.definition_ko: 여러 사람이 어떤 문제에 대해 자세히 따지고 의논함.

translations.definition: An act of many people going over and sharing thoughts on the details of a certain issue.

senses.definition_ko: 먹은 것을 도로 입 밖으로 쏟아 내다.

translations.definition: To let something one has eaten come out of one's mouth.

senses.definition_ko: 전혀. 또는 도무지.

translations.definition: Not at all, or utterly.
translations.example: to have absolutely nothing to say.

senses.definition_ko: 서로 다른 나라 말을 사용하는 사람들 사이에서 뜻이 통하도록 말을 옮겨 줌.

translations.definition: An act of delivering a message between speakers of different languages, making sure that its meaning is conveyed.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 담기 위해 깊고 오목하게 만든 그릇.

translations.definition: A deep and concave container made to hold something.

senses.definition_ko: 나누어지거나 갈라진 것들을 합쳐서 하나가 되게 함.

translations.definition: An act of combining what has been divided or split into one.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 경우의 수나 횟수를 모두 합해서 일정한 체계에 따라 수치로 나타냄. 또는 그런 것.

translations.definition: An act of adding up a certain number of cases or the number of times, and indicating the result as a number based on a fixed system, or such a thing.

senses.definition_ko: 금융 기관에서, 예금한 사람에게 예금의 입금과 출금 내역을 적어 주는 장부.

translations.definition: A book issued by a bank to a depositor, used to record deposits and withdrawals.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 장소나 때를 거쳐서 지나감.

translations.definition: An act of going through a certain place or time.

senses.definition_ko: 아픈 증세.

translations.definition: A symptom that is painful.

senses.definition_ko: 우편이나 전신, 전화 등으로 정보나 소식 등을 전달함.

translations.definition: An act of sending information, news, etc., using such means as mail, telegraph, telephone, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 키가 작고 살이 쪄서 몸이 옆으로 퍼져 있다.

translations.definition: One's body being short and wide due to extra fat.

senses.definition_ko: 막힘이 없이 흐르다.

translations.definition: To flow well without any blockage.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 곳을 지나다님.

translations.definition: An act of passing a certain place.

senses.definition_ko: 현재의 직업이나 직무에서 물러남.

translations.definition: An act of resigning from one's present job or duty.

senses.definition_ko: 전화로 말을 주고받음.

translations.definition: An act of talking with someone using a telephone.

senses.definition_ko: 이익을 얻기 위해 어떤 일이나 사업에 돈을 대거나 시간이나 정성을 쏟음.

translations.definition: An act of spending money, time, or energy in a certain project or business, to gain a profit.

senses.definition_ko: 일터에서 일을 끝내고 집으로 돌아가거나 돌아옴.

translations.equivalent: leaving work; arriving home from work
translations.definition: An act of leaving one's workplace or returning home after work.
translations.example: It is time to leave work for the day.

senses.definition_ko: 선거를 하거나 어떤 일을 결정할 때 정해진 용지에 의견을 표시하여 내는 일.

translations.definition: An act of indicating one's opinion in a ballot and submitting it, to elect someone or to make a decision about something.

senses.definition_ko: 일정 기간 병원에 머물며 치료를 받던 환자가 병원에서 나옴.

translations.equivalent: discharge (from the hospital); leaving the hospital
translations.definition: An act of leaving the hospital after one stayed there for a certain period of time to have one's disease treated.
translations.example: The doctor discharges the patient from the hospital.

senses.definition_ko: 끓는 기름에 넣어서 부풀게 하다.

senses.definition_ko: 생선이나 고기, 야채 등을 밀가루에 묻혀서 기름에 튀긴 음식.

translations.definition: Food that is made by coating fish, meat, vegetables, etc., with flour and frying it.

senses.definition_ko: 물건을 실어 나르는 자동차.

translations.definition: A vehicle that carries cargo.
translations.example: to load one's baggage into the truck.

senses.definition_ko: 남이 가지지 못한 특별한 기술이나 재능.

translations.definition: One's special skill or talent that someone else does not have.
translations.example: There are various hobbies and specialties.

senses.definition_ko: 보통과 차이가 나게 다르다.

translations.definition: Being different from what is normal, with a noticeable gap.

senses.definition_ko: 보통과 차이가 나게 다르게.

translations.definition: With a noticeable difference compared with others.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 사물에만 있는 보통과 매우 차이가 나게 다른 성질.

translations.definition: A characteristic of certain things only, which is noticeably different from others.

senses.definition_ko: 보통과 매우 차이가 나게 다름.

senses.definition_ko: 특별히 가리켜 분명하게 정함.

translations.definition: An act of fixing a specific target, place, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 것에 비해 특별히 달라 눈에 띄는 점.

senses.definition_ko: 보통과 다르게.

translations.definition: Differently from a normal one.

senses.definition_ko: 사람의 몸이나 뼈, 이 등이 단단하고 굳세거나 건강하다.

translations.definition: One's body, bones, teeth, etc., being hard, firm, and healthy.

senses.definition_ko: 기계나 장치를 작동시키다.

translations.definition: To operate a machine or device.

senses.definition_ko: 계산이나 답, 사실 등이 맞지 않다.

translations.definition: For a calculation, answer, fact, etc., to not be correct.

senses.definition_ko: 조금도 틀리거나 어긋나는 일이 없다.

translations.definition: Absolutely correct, not wrong at all.

senses.definition_ko: 조금도 틀리거나 어긋나는 일이 없이.

translations.definition: Absolutely correctly, without a chance of being wrong.

senses.definition_ko: 벌어져서 사이가 생긴 자리.

translations.definition: The space forming in between when an object is divided.

senses.definition_ko: 시간적인 여유가 있을 때마다.

translations.definition: Every time when one has more time.

senses.definition_ko: 'T'자 모양으로 생긴 반팔 셔츠.

translations.definition: A short-sleeved shirt that looks like the letter 'T'.

senses.definition_ko: 같은 일을 함께하는 한 무리.

translations.definition: A group of people who do the same kind of work.

senses.definition_ko: 속은 둥근 기둥 모양으로 속이 비고 끝이 뾰족하게 길며, 독특한 냄새와 맛이 있어 양념으로 자주 쓰이는 채소.

translations.definition: A vegetable whose long, pointy, cylindrical leaves are empty in the center, and which is often used as garnish or seasoning due to its unique smell and flavor.

senses.definition_ko: 맑은 하늘이나 바다처럼 밝고 선명한 푸른색.

translations.definition: The color of light and clear blue, like that of a clear sky or ocean.

senses.definition_ko: 때려 부수거나 깨뜨려 무너뜨림.

translations.definition: An act of smashing or breaking something into pieces to bring it down.

senses.definition_ko: 파란 빛깔이나 물감.

translations.definition: A blue color or paint.

senses.definition_ko: 구멍이나 구덩이를 만들다.

senses.definition_ko: 맑은 가을 하늘이나 깊은 바다와 같이 밝고 선명하게 푸르다.

translations.definition: A color being brightly and vividly blue like that of a clear fall sky or deep sea.

senses.definition_ko: 바다에 이는 물결.

translations.definition: Waves forming in the sea.

entry.visual_material: Illustration of a woman touching her permed hair.

senses.definition_ko: 기계나 약품으로 머리를 구불구불하게 하거나 곱게 펴 오랫동안 그러한 상태가 유지되도록 함. 또는 그 렇게 한 머리.

translations.definition: An act of curling or straightening hair and keeping it that way for a long time, using a machine or chemical substance; or hair done in such a manner.

senses.definition_ko: 서류들을 한데 모아 매어 두게 만든 도구. 또는 그렇게 매어 둔 서류 묶음.

translations.definition: An implement used to bind and collect documents in a bundle, or such a bundle.

entry.visual_material: An illustration of a judge presiding in a courtroom with court personnel.

senses.definition_ko: 대법원을 제외한 법원의 법관.

senses.definition_ko: 경찰서가 맡고 있는 지역 안에 있는 동마다 경찰관을 보내 업무를 처리하도록 만든 곳.

senses.definition_ko: 어깨에서 손목까지의 신체 부위.

translations.definition: The body part from the shoulder to the wrist.

senses.definition_ko: 친목을 도모하거나 무엇을 기념하기 위한 잔치나 모임.

senses.definition_ko: 칠에 일을 더한 수.

translations.definition: The number that is the sum of seven and one.

senses.definition_ko: 논리나 기준에 따라 어떠한 것에 대한 생각을 정함.

translations.definition: The state of fixing a thought on something, according to a certain logic or standard.

senses.definition_ko: 상품을 팜.

translations.definition: An act of selling products.

senses.definition_ko: 팔의 위아래 뼈가 이어진 곳의 바깥 부분.

translations.definition: The outer part of the joint between one's upper and lower arm bone.

senses.definition_ko: 십의 여덟 배가 되는 수.
senses.example_ko: 일 년에 책을 팔십 권씩 읽다.

translations.definition: The number that is the product of eight times ten.
translations.example: to read eighty books in a year.

entry.visual_material: An illustration showing a woman selling fruits at a market stall. Speech bubble reads '과일을 팔다'.

senses.definition_ko: 값을 받고 물건이나 권리를 남에게 넘기거나 노력 등을 제공하다.

translations.definition: To give an object or a right to someone or provide one's effort, etc., to someone after receiving money for it.

senses.definition_ko: 옷차림이나 외모를 꾸미는 형식과 관련된 분야.

translations.definition: A field related with the ways of coordinating clothes or enhancing the looks of people.

entry.visual_material: An illustration showing a woman selling fruits at a market stall. Speech bubble reads '과일이 팔리다'.

senses.definition_ko: 값을 받고 물건이나 권리가 다른 사람에게 넘겨지거나 노력 등이 제공되다.

translations.definition: For an object or a right to be given to someone or for one's effort, etc., to be provided to someone after money is received for it.

senses.definition_ko: 운동 경기나 특정 예술 장르, 또는 운동선수나 배우, 가수 등을 열광적으로 좋아하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who passionately loves a sport, specific art genre, or an athlete, actor, singer, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 아랫도리에 입는 아주 짧은 속옷.

translations.definition: Very short underwear worn on one's lower body.

senses.definition_ko: 전체 수량을 백으로 하여 그것에 대해 가지는 비율을 나타내는 단위.

translations.definition: A bound noun serving as a unit to express a ratio of something against the whole quantity, which is set as 100.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 물질이나 현상이 넓은 범위에 미치다.

translations.definition: For a certain substance or phenomenon to reach a wide range.
translations.example: The fragrance spread through the office.

senses.definition_ko: 보통 정도를 훨씬 넘게.

translations.definition: In a degree greatly exceeding normal.

senses.definition_ko: 접히거나 말려 있는 것을 젖혀서 벌리다.

translations.definition: To bend back and spread a folded or rolled object.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇이 나아가거나 향하는 방향.

translations.definition: A bound noun used to indicate a direction something advances into or is headed.

senses.definition_ko: 공평하고 올바르지 못하고 한쪽으로 치우친 생각.

translations.definition: A thought that is unfair, incorrect, and one-sided.

senses.definition_ko: 이용하기 쉽고 편함.

translations.definition: The state of something being easy and comfortable to use.

senses.definition_ko: 좋아하는 음식만을 가려서 먹음.

translations.definition: An act of selecting and eating only what one likes.

senses.definition_ko: 몸이나 마음이 편하고 좋음.

senses.definition_ko: 형편이나 조건 등이 편하고 좋음.

senses.definition_ko: 하루 이십사 시간 내내 문을 열고 간단한 생활필수품 등을 파는 가게.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 사람에게 하고 싶은 말을 적어서 보내는 글.

translations.definition: The act of saying what one has to say in writing and sending it to another person.

senses.definition_ko: 몸이나 마음이 편하지 않거나 괴롭다.

translations.definition: One's body or mind being uncomfortable or troubled.

senses.definition_ko: 몸이나 마음이 괴롭지 않고 좋다.

senses.definition_ko: 몸이나 마음이 괴롭지 않고 좋게.

senses.definition_ko: 펴서 드러내다.

senses.definition_ko: 좋고 나쁨, 잘하고 못함, 옳고 그름 등을 평가함. 또는 그런 말.

translations.definition: An act of evaluating whether something is good or bad, well-done or poorly-done, right or wrong, etc., or such a remark.

senses.definition_ko: 사물의 값이나 가치, 수준 등을 헤아려 정함. 또는 그 값이나 가치, 수준.

senses.definition_ko: 수나 양, 정도의 중간값을 갖는 수.

senses.definition_ko: 권리, 의무, 자격 등이 차별 없이 고르고 똑같음.

translations.definition: The state in which the rights, obligations, qualifications, etc., are equal and identical, without discrimination.

senses.definition_ko: 뛰어나거나 특별한 점이 없이 보통이다.

senses.definition_ko: 전쟁이나 다툼 등의 갈등이 없이 조용하고 화목함.

senses.definition_ko: 특별한 일이 없는 보통 때.

senses.definition_ko: 실시해 오던 제도나 법규, 일 등을 그만두거나 없앰.

senses.definition_ko: 세상에 태어나서 죽을 때까지의 동안.

senses.definition_ko: 두꺼운 물건이나 자리가 보드랍고 따뜻하다.

senses.definition_ko: 특별한 일이 없는 보통 때.

translations.definition: Ordinary times in which nothing special is happening.

senses.definition_ko: 하려던 일이나 생각을 중간에 그만둠.

translations.definition: An act of stopping doing something one intended to do or a thought.

senses.definition_ko: 달면서도 약간 신맛이 나는 작은 열매가 뭉쳐서 송이를 이루는 보라색 과일.

senses.definition_ko: 포도를 원료로 하여 만든 술.

senses.definition_ko: 물건을 싸거나 꾸림. 또는 싸거나 꾸리는 데 사용하는 재료.

senses.definition_ko: 물건을 싸거나 꾸리는 데 쓰는 종이나 비닐.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 무리나 범위에 함께 들어 있거나 함께 넣음.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것을 다루는 시각이나 연구하는 방법이 다양하다.

translations.definition: The view of something or method of study being various.

senses.definition_ko: 남을 해치거나 사납게 제압하기 위해 주먹이나 발, 무기 등을 사용해 쓰는 힘.

translations.definition: The power of hurting or pressing down someone fiercely, using a fist, foot, weapon, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 속에 쌓여 있던 감정 등이 한꺼번에 거세게 쏟아져 나옴.

senses.definition_ko: 갑자기 많이 내리는 눈.

translations.definition: Snow that falls a lot suddenly.

senses.definition_ko: 갑자기 많이 쏟아지는 비.

translations.definition: Sudden rain that pours down heavily.

senses.definition_ko: 절벽에서 쏟아져 내리는 세찬 물줄기.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 내용을 일정한 형식과 순서에 따라 보기 좋게 나타낸 것.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 권리가 있음을 증명하는 쪽지.

translations.definition: A note that certifies that the holder of the note has a certain right.

senses.definition_ko: 사물의 가장 바깥쪽. 또는 가장 윗부분.

translations.definition: The outermost side or top of an object.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사항을 알리는 내용을 겉에 드러내 보임.

translations.definition: An act of displaying the content of a notice or an instruction on the surface of something.

senses.definition_ko: 마음속에 품은 감정이나 생각 등이 얼굴에 드러남. 또는 그런 모습.

translations.definition: The state of one's face showing one's feeling, thought, etc., or such a face.

senses.definition_ko: 사물의 성격이나 정도 등을 알기 위한 근거나 기준.

translations.definition: A base or criterion used to find out the characteristic, degree, etc., of an object.

senses.definition_ko: 한 나라에서 공식적으로 쓰는 언어.

translations.definition: A language that is officially used in a country.

senses.definition_ko: 책의 맨 앞과 뒤를 둘러싼 종이나 가죽.

translations.definition: The paper or leather used to wrap the front and back of a book.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사실을 알리기 위해 일정한 표시를 해 놓은 판.

translations.definition: A board on which a specific mark is seen to inform the public of a certain fact.

senses.definition_ko: 느낌이나 생각 등을 말, 글, 몸짓 등으로 나타내어 겉으로 드러냄.

translations.definition: An act of turning one's feelings, thoughts, etc., into a speech, a piece of writing, a gesture, etc., and showing it.

senses.definition_ko: 속에 들어 있는 액체, 가루, 곡식 등을 떠내어 밖으로 나오게 하다.

translations.definition: To scoop up the liquid, powder, grains, etc., contained in something and make the content come outside.

senses.definition_ko: 맑은 가을 하늘이나 깊은 바다, 싱싱한 풀의 빛깔과 같이 밝고 선명하다.

translations.definition: Clear and vivid blue, like that of a clear fall sky, deep ocean, or fresh grass.

senses.definition_ko: 잠이 깊이 들거나 피곤한 몸을 충분히 편하게 쉬는 모양.

translations.definition: A word describing an act of falling asleep or taking a good rest to recover from fatigue.

senses.definition_ko: 쌀이나 밀가루 등에서 빼낸, 천이나 옷 등을 빳빳하게 만들거나 무엇을 붙일 때 쓰는 끈끈한 물질.

translations.definition: A sticky substance made from rice or wheat that is used as an adhesive or to starch clothes, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 줄기가 연하고, 대개 한 해를 지내면 죽는 식물.

senses.definition_ko: 매이거나 묶이거나 얽힌 것을 원래의 상태로 되게 하다.

translations.definition: To return what has been tied, bound, or twisted back to its original state.

senses.definition_ko: 묶이거나 감기거나 얽히거나 싸인 것 등이 도로 원래의 상태가 되다.

senses.definition_ko: 윗옷의 겨드랑이 밑의 가슴과 등을 두르는 부분의 넓이.

translations.definition: The area of an upper garment below the armpits that covers the chest and back.
translations.example: This item of clothing has ample width in the chest.

senses.definition_ko: 품속에 넣거나 가슴에 대어 안다.

translations.definition: To put someone or something in one's bosom, or hug someone against one's chest.

senses.definition_ko: 물건의 성질과 바탕.

translations.definition: The traits and basis of something.

senses.definition_ko: 자연이나 지역의 아름다운 모습.

translations.definition: A beautiful scene of nature or an area.

senses.definition_ko: 냄새가 나다. 또는 냄새를 퍼뜨리다.

translations.definition: For a smell to come off, or to spread a smell.

senses.definition_ko: 넉넉하고 많다.

senses.definition_ko: 커다란 주머니에 수소나 헬륨 등의 공기보다 가벼운 기체를 넣어, 공중에 높이 올라가도록 만든 물건.

translations.definition: An object made to rise high in the air by inflating a large bag with such lighter-than-air gases as hydrogen, helium, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 사회에 속한 사람들에게 옛날부터 전해 오는 생활 습관.

translations.definition: For people belonging to a society, a life habit that has been handed over from the past.

senses.definition_ko: 풍속과 습관.

translations.definition: Customs and habits of a certain region.

senses.definition_ko: 음식을 기름에 지지거나 튀기는 데 쓰는, 손잡이가 달리고 높이가 낮으며 넓적한 냄비.

translations.definition: A low, wide pan with a handle, used to stir-fry or fry food in oil.
translations.example: to stir-fry in a frying pan.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일에 지식이나 기술을 갖추고 그 일을 전문으로 하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who has the knowledge or skills in a certain field of work and specializes in doing the work.
translations.example: to watch a professional baseball game.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 행사의 진행 계획이나 순서를 적은 목록. 또는 그 행사의 세부 항목.

translations.definition: The list of operation plans or orders of a certain event, on the details of such an event.
translations.example: to look into the event program.

senses.definition_ko: 열이나 압력을 가해 쉽게 모양을 만들 수 있는 물질.

translations.definition: Substance whose shape can be changed easily by heating or pressing it.
translations.example: to put (something) in the plastic container.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물의 몸 안의 혈관을 돌며 산소와 영양분을 공급하고, 노폐물을 운반하는 붉은색의 액체.

translations.definition: A red liquid that moves along the blood vessels in the human or animal body to supply oxygen and nutrients and transport waste matter.

senses.definition_ko: 몸이나 마음이 지쳐서 힘듦.

translations.definition: The state of being tired and worn-out physically or mentally.

senses.definition_ko: 꽃봉오리나 잎 등이 벌어지다.

translations.definition: For a flower bud, leaf, etc., to open.

senses.definition_ko: 몸이나 정신이 지쳐서 힘듦. 또는 그런 상태.

translations.definition: Being tired and worn-out physically or mentally, or such a state.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물의 몸을 싸고 있는 살의 겉 부분.

translations.definition: The outer surface of the flesh that covers the human or animal body.

entry.visual_material: An illustration of people enjoying summer activities like swimming and playing on a beach.

senses.definition_ko: 더위를 피해 시원한 곳으로 감.

translations.definition: To go to a cool place, away from the summer heat.
translations.example: to go to the beach for a summer vacation.

senses.definition_ko: 원치 않은 일을 당하거나 어려운 일이 일어나지 않게 하다.

translations.definition: To make sure that unwanted or difficult things don't happen to oneself.

senses.definition_ko: 검은색과 흰색 건반을 손가락으로 두드리거나 눌러서 소리를 내는 큰 악기.

translations.definition: A musical instrument that produces sound when its black and white keys are tapped or pressed with fingers.

senses.definition_ko: 생명이나 신체, 재산, 명예 등에 손해를 입음. 또는 그 손해.

translations.definition: The act of suffering physical harm, or the loss of property, reputation, etc., or such a harm or loss.

senses.definition_ko: 꽃봉오리나 잎 등을 벌어지게 하다.

translations.definition: To open up the buds or petals of a flower, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 피해를 입은 사람.

senses.definition_ko: 강의, 강연, 연설 등의 내용을 받아 적음.

senses.definition_ko: 하고 싶지 않은 일을 피하거나 사실을 감추려고 다른 일을 내세움.

translations.definition: The act of giving a justification to avoid unwanted things or hide the truth.

senses.definition_ko: 꼭 있어야 하거나 해야 함.

translations.definition: A state of being essential or required.

senses.definition_ko: 꼭 있어야 함.

translations.definition: A state of being necessary.

senses.definition_ko: 꼭 있어야 하는 성질.

translations.definition: The quality of being necessary.

senses.definition_ko: 연필, 지우개 등을 넣어서 가지고 다니는 주머니나 상자.

translations.definition: A pouch or box carried to hold pencils, erasers, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 차례나 등급 등을 상, 하 또는 상, 중, 하로 나누었을 때 맨 아래.

translations.definition: The bottom or lowest in a class or level, etc., when divided into top and bottom, or top, middle, and bottom.

senses.definition_ko: 땅 위로 펼쳐진 무한히 넓은 공간.

translations.definition: The vast, limitless space that unfolds above the ground.

senses.definition_ko: 사실 말하자면.

translations.definition: To tell the truth.

senses.definition_ko: 맑은 하늘의 빛깔과 같은 연한 파란색.

translations.definition: A pale blue color like that of a clear sky.

senses.definition_ko: 숫자를 셀 때 맨 처음의 수.

translations.definition: The very first number when counting numbers.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 행동이나 동작, 활동 등을 행하다.

translations.definition: To perform a certain move, action, activity, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 하나씩 하나씩.

translations.definition: One by one.

senses.definition_ko: (강조하는 말로) 매우 심하거나 아주 크게.

translations.definition: (emphasizing form) Extremely or excessively.

senses.definition_ko: 밤 열두 시부터 다음 날 밤 열두 시까지의 스물네 시간.

translations.example: It takes a day (to do something).

senses.definition_ko: 눈이나 우유의 빛깔과 같이 밝고 선명한 흰색.

senses.definition_ko: 하얀 빛깔이나 물감.

translations.definition: A white color or paint.

senses.definition_ko: 눈이나 우유의 빛깔과 같이 밝고 선명하게 희다.

senses.definition_ko: 타고 있던 차에서 내림.

translations.definition: The act of getting off or out of a vehicle.

senses.definition_ko: 졸리거나 피곤하거나 배부르거나 할 때, 저절로 입이 크게 벌어지면서 하는 깊은 호흡.

senses.definition_ko: 입을 벌리고 크게 웃는 소리. 또는 그 모양.

senses.definition_ko: 한 학년 동안을 학업의 필요에 따라 구분한 기간.

translations.definition: The unit for the annual learning process in school education.
translations.example: to enter the third grade (in school).

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 목적, 교과 과정, 제도 등에 의하여 교사가 학생을 가르치는 기관.

translations.definition: An institution where teachers teach students in accordance with a certain purpose, curriculum, or policy, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 학교를 다닌 경력.

translations.definition: The level of education one completes.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 분야를 체계적으로 배워서 익힘. 또는 그런 지식.

translations.definition: The act of studying a certain field systematically; or such knowledge.

senses.definition_ko: 배워서 익힘.

translations.definition: To study and learn something.
translations.example: the study of a foreign language.

senses.definition_ko: 학생을 자녀로 둔 부모.

translations.definition: Parents whose children are students.

senses.definition_ko: 필기도구나 공책 등과 같이 공부할 때 필요한 물품.

senses.definition_ko: 학교에 다니고 공부를 하는 데에 드는 비용.

senses.definition_ko: 학생을 모집하여 지식, 기술, 예체능 등을 가르치는 사립 교육 기관.

senses.definition_ko: 학교에 다니면서 공부하는 사람.

senses.definition_ko: 특정 학문을 아주 잘 아는 사람. 또는 학문을 연구하는 사람.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 학교에 소속된 학생임을 증명하는 문서.

senses.definition_ko: 하나의.

translations.definition: One.

entry.visual_material: Illustration of a sad woman with ghost-like figures

senses.definition_ko: 몹시 원망스럽고 억울하거나 안타깝고 슬퍼서 응어리진 마음.

translations.definition: A feeling of bitterness, deep resentment or sorrow that builds up in one's mind from an unfair or regretful event.

entry.visual_material: Illustration of a soccer field with a player in the middle

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 장소나 시간, 상황 등의 바로 가운데.

translations.definition: The dead center of a certain place or time, situation, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 바쁘지 않고 여유가 있다.

translations.definition: Having time to spare without haste.

senses.definition_ko: 전보다 훨씬 더.

translations.definition: Much better than before.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 것이 실제로 일어나거나 영향을 미칠 수 있는 범위나 경계.

translations.definition: The range or boundary within which something really happens or affects something else.

senses.definition_ko: 아시아 대륙의 동쪽에 있는 나라. 한반도와 그 부속 섬들로 이루어져 있으며, 대한민국이라고도 부른다. 1950년에 일어난 육이오 전쟁 이후 휴전선을 사이에 두고 국토가 둘로 나뉘었다. 언어는 한국어이고, 수도는 서울이다.

translations.definition: A country located in East Asia; it consists of the Korean Peninsula and affiliated islands; divided into South Korea and North Korea since the 1953 ceasefire agreement, it is called either the Republic of Korea or South Korea; the official language is Korean and the capital is Seoul.

senses.definition_ko: 한국에서 사용하는 말.

translations.definition: The language used by the Korean people.

senses.definition_ko: 한국에서 사용하는 말.

translations.definition: The language used by the Korean people.

senses.definition_ko: 낮의 한가운데로, 낮 열두 시 전후인 때.

translations.definition: The middle of the day, which is the time right before or after noon.

senses.definition_ko: 한 번 봄. 또는 잠깐 봄.

translations.definition: An act of taking a look at something once or briefly.

senses.definition_ko: 대한민국 국적을 가졌거나 한민족의 혈통과 정신을 이어받은 사람.

translations.definition: A person who has the nationality of Republic of Korea or a descendent of a Korean lineage and spirit.

senses.definition_ko: 꽤 오랫동안.

translations.equivalent: being for a long time; being for a while
translations.definition: A long duration of time.

senses.definition_ko: 한국 문자의 이름.

translations.definition: The name for the Korean alphabet.

senses.definition_ko: 하나나 둘의.

translations.equivalent: a couple of; one or two
translations.definition: One or two.
translations.example: There are a couple of students in the classroom.

senses.definition_ko: 몰아서 한 번에. 또는 전부 다 동시에.

translations.equivalent: at a stroke; at one blow
translations.definition: In one stroke, or all at the same time.
translations.example: to do (several things) at the same time.

senses.definition_ko: 하나나 둘쯤 되는 수.

translations.definition: A number that is about one or two.

senses.definition_ko: 어느 시기의 짧은 동안에.

senses.definition_ko: 아주 짧은 시간 동안.

senses.definition_ko: 짧고 간단한 말.

translations.definition: Short and simple words.

senses.definition_ko: 걱정이 있을 때나 긴장했다가 마음을 놓을 때 길게 몰아서 내쉬는 숨.

senses.definition_ko: 한자로 쓰인 글.

translations.definition: A text written in hanja, which is Chinese characters used in Korea.

senses.definition_ko: 한국 고유의 음식.

translations.definition: Korean dishes.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일을 시험 삼아 시도함을 나타내는 말.

translations.definition: An adverb used to indicate that the speaker tries something.

senses.definition_ko: 우리나라 고유의 음식을 파는 음식점.

senses.definition_ko: 한국의 전통 의복.

translations.definition: Traditional Korean clothes.

senses.definition_ko: 더위가 가장 심할 무렵의 여름.

translations.definition: The time in summer when the heat is most severe.

entry.visual_material: An illustration of a traditional Korean house.

senses.definition_ko: 우리나라 고유의 형식으로 지은 집.

translations.definition: A traditional Korean house or a house built in such a style.

senses.definition_ko: 우리나라 전통 의술로 치료하는 의사.

translations.example: to get acupuncture from a doctor of traditional Korean medicine.

senses.definition_ko: 우리나라 전통 의술로 환자를 치료하는 의원.

translations.example: to have medicine prepared at an herbal medicine clinic.

senses.definition_ko: 중국에서 만들어 오늘날에도 쓰고 있는 중국 고유의 문자.

translations.definition: Chinese unique characters created in China and being used today in the country.

senses.definition_ko: 간단하게 한 차례 마시는 차나 술.

translations.equivalent: a cup of; a drink; a glass of
translations.definition: A cup of tea or a drink that one has lightly.

senses.definition_ko: 어느 한 부분이나 방향.

translations.definition: One part of something or one direction.

senses.definition_ko: 시간이 꽤 지나는 동안.

translations.definition: A lapse of a fairly long time.
translations.example: to wait for a long time.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 정도에서 한 단계 더.

translations.definition: More than a certain degree.

senses.definition_ko: 남에게 크게 음식이나 술을 대접하는 일.

translations.definition: An act of treating someone with a lot of good food or drink.
translations.example: to treat a colleague (to drinks or a meal).

senses.definition_ko: 같은 편.

translations.definition: The same side.

senses.definition_ko: 정해진 가격에서 얼마를 뺀 상품만 전문적으로 파는 가게.

translations.definition: A store that specializes in selling goods at a reduction from the original price.
translations.example: to buy (something) at a discount store.

senses.definition_ko: 아버지의 어머니, 또는 어머니의 어머니를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to refer to or address the mother of one's father or mother.
translations.example: to take one's grandmother to the hospital./to see the doctor.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿이서 한꺼번에 같이.

translations.definition: In the state of several people being all together.
translations.example: to have fun together at the amusement park.

senses.definition_ko: 돈을 여러 번에 나누어 냄.

translations.definition: An act of paying off a debt in successive payments.

senses.definition_ko: 조심하거나 깊이 생각하지 않고 마구.

translations.definition: Recklessly without being careful or thinking deeply.

senses.definition_ko: 아버지의 아버지 또는 어머니의 아버지를 이르거나 부르는 말.

translations.definition: A word used to refer to or address the father of one's father or mother.
translations.example: to go to one's grandfather's house and come back.

senses.definition_ko: 시험, 검사, 심사 등을 통과함.

translations.definition: The act of passing a test, inspection, screening, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 정해진 가격에서 얼마를 뺌.

translations.definition: The act of subtracting a certain amount of money from the original price.
translations.example: to have a coupon (for a discount).

senses.definition_ko: 한데 합하여 계산함. 또는 그렇게 계산하여 나온 값.

translations.definition: The act of adding numbers, or the added value.

senses.definition_ko: 논리나 이치에 알맞은 것.

translations.definition: A state of being in accordance with logic or reason.

senses.definition_ko: 비행기에 탈 수 있는 표.

translations.definition: A ticket whose holder is allowed to board a plane.

senses.definition_ko: 서로 의견이 일치함. 또는 그 의견.

translations.definition: A state of having the same opinion as someone else; or such an opinion.

senses.definition_ko: 비행기 등을 이용할 때 내는 돈.

translations.definition: Money paid for using a plane, etc.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿을 하나로 모으다.

translations.definition: To put many things together to form one entity.

senses.definition_ko: 어느 때에나 변함없이.

translations.definition: Invariably at any time.
translations.example: to always get up at the same time.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿이 한데 모이다. 또는 여럿을 한데 모으거나 모으게 하다.

translations.definition: For many things or people to come together; or to put them together.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일이 올바르지 않거나 마음에 들지 않아 반대하는 뜻을 주장함.

translations.definition: An act of raising an objection to something because one thinks it is not right or satisfying.
translations.example: to make a call in protest.

senses.definition_ko: 비행기로 공중을 날아다님.

translations.definition: The act of flying in the air on a plane.
translations.example: to be in charge of aviation work.

senses.definition_ko: 태양계의 중심에 있으며 온도가 매우 높고 스스로 빛을 내는 항성.

translations.definition: The star at the center of a solar system which is extremely hot and emits light.

senses.definition_ko: 이롭지 않게 하거나 손상을 입힘. 또는 그런 것.

senses.definition_ko: 틀림없이 그러한지를 알아보거나 인정함.

translations.definition: An act of finding out if something is true or admitting that it is true.
translations.example: to make the contract after checking the amount.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 노선으로 갈아탈 수 있는 역.

translations.definition: A subway or rail station where one can transfer to another line.
translations.example: to transfer to another train at a subway transfer station.

senses.definition_ko: 오는 사람을 기쁘고 반갑게 맞이함.

translations.definition: The act of receiving someone gladly and cordially upon his/her arrival.
translations.example: to be welcomed by one's friends.

senses.definition_ko: 빛이 비치어 맑고 밝다.

translations.definition: Being very clear and bright as light shines.

senses.definition_ko: 오는 사람을 기쁘고 반갑게 맞이하기 위해 갖는 모임.

translations.definition: A gathering arranged for greeting the arrival of someone gladly and cordially.
translations.example: to hold an orientation for freshmen.

senses.definition_ko: 활발한 기운.

translations.definition: A lively spirit.

senses.definition_ko: 경제에서, 자기 나라 돈을 다른 나라 돈으로 바꿀 때의 비율.

translations.definition: In economics, the rate at which the currency of one country is changed into that of another country.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일에서 좋은 결과를 거두기 위해 힘씀.

translations.definition: An act of striving to achieve a good result in a certain task.

senses.definition_ko: 몸에 병이 들거나 다쳐서 아픈 사람.

translations.definition: A person who is ill due to a disease or injury.

senses.definition_ko: 생기가 있고 힘차다.

translations.definition: Being full of life and energy.

senses.definition_ko: 한 나라의 화폐를 다른 나라의 화폐와 맞바꿈.

translations.definition: The act of changing one country's currency into another's.
translations.example: to change Korean won into dollars.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 대상이 가지고 있는 쓰임이나 능력을 충분히 잘 이용함.

translations.definition: An act of making full use of a function or ability possessed by a certain object.

senses.definition_ko: 문 등이 완전히 열린 모양.

translations.definition: A word describing the state of a door, etc., being completely open.

senses.definition_ko: 고기나 생선 등을 날로 잘게 썰어서 먹는 음식.

translations.definition: Thinly sliced meat or fish that is consumed raw.

senses.definition_ko: 횟수를 세는 단위.

translations.definition: A bound noun that serves as a unit for counting the number of times.
translations.example: to watch the first episode of a drama.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 문제를 가지고 거기에 관련된 사람들이 모여서 토의함. 또는 그 토의.

translations.definition: A state in which interested parties meet and discuss a certain matter; or such a discussion.

senses.definition_ko: 아프거나 약해졌던 몸을 다시 예전의 상태로 돌이킴.

translations.definition: A state in which the health of a sick or weak person goes back to a normal condition.

senses.definition_ko: 모임에서 사용하기 위하여 그 모임의 회원들이 내는 돈.

translations.definition: Money paid by members of an association to be spent on its activities.

senses.definition_ko: 사업을 통해 이익을 얻기 위해 여러 사람이 모여 만든 법인 단체.

translations.definition: A legal entity created together by many people to earn profits by running a certain business.

senses.definition_ko: 회사에 속하여 일하는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who works at a company.

senses.definition_ko: 재의 빛깔처럼 검은색과 흰색이 섞인 색.

translations.definition: A mixed color of black and white, like that of ash.

senses.definition_ko: 모임이나 단체에 속한 사람이 모여 함께 음식을 먹음. 또는 그런 모임.

translations.definition: A state in which people in a certain group or organization dine out together; or such a meeting.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 모임을 이루는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who is part of a certain meeting.

senses.definition_ko: 반복해서 일어나는 차례의 수.

translations.definition: The number of repeated occurrences of an event, etc.
translations.example: to count the number of times.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿이 모여 의논함. 또는 그런 모임.

translations.definition: An act of gathering to discuss a topic or issue; or such a meeting.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이 건너다닐 수 있도록 차도 위에 표시를 해 놓은 길.

translations.definition: A route marked on a road, where people can cross.

senses.definition_ko: 여럿이 모여 의논할 때에 쓰는 방.

translations.definition: A room where people gather and discuss a topic, issue, etc.
translations.example: to gather in the meeting room.

senses.definition_ko: 어떠한 것을 하여 얻어지는 좋은 결과.

translations.definition: A good result achieved from doing something.

senses.definition_ko: 모임을 대표하고 모임의 일을 책임지는 사람.

translations.definition: A person who presides over a meeting, being responsible for handling the affairs of the meeting.

senses.definition_ko: 부모를 정성껏 잘 모시어 받드는 일.

translations.definition: A state of respecting and taking care of one's parents with all one's heart.
translations.example: to be dutiful to one's parents.

senses.definition_ko: 외국어로 이야기를 나눔. 또는 그런 이야기.

translations.definition: An act of talking with another in foreign language; or such a talk.

senses.definition_ko: 부모를 잘 모시어 받드는 아들.
senses.example_ko: 우리 자손 중에는 효자와 효녀가 많다.

translations.definition: A son who respects and takes good care of his parents.
translations.example: Many of our descendants are devoted sons and daughters.

senses.definition_ko: 얼마만큼 시간이 지난 다음.

translations.definition: A point of time following a certain passage of time.

senses.definition_ko: 전체를 반씩 둘로 나누는 것의 뒤쪽 반.

translations.definition: The latter half of a period, match, etc., when divided into two.
translations.example: The game enters the second half.

senses.definition_ko: 같은 분야에서 자기보다 늦게 일을 시작한 사람.

translations.definition: A person who started a career in the same field later than oneself.
translations.example: to meet a junior colleague at one's company.

senses.definition_ko: 선거에서, 어떤 직위나 신분을 얻기 위해 일정한 자격을 갖추어 나섬. 또는 그런 사람.

translations.definition: An act of qualifying oneself to run in an election for a certain position or status; or such a person.

senses.definition_ko: 식사 후에 먹는 간단한 음식.

translations.definition: A serving of simple food after a meal.

senses.definition_ko: 검고 동그란 모양이며 매운 맛과 향기가 나 주로 음식의 양념으로 쓰는 열매.

translations.definition: A black, round-shaped fruit used usually as seasoning for food because of its spicy taste and smell.

senses.definition_ko: 이전에 자신이 한 일이 잘못임을 깨닫고 스스로 자신의 잘못을 꾸짖음.

translations.definition: An act of realizing that what one did was wrong and reprimanding oneself for having done it.

senses.definition_ko: 기본자세나 동작 등을 되풀이하여 익힘.

translations.definition: An act of learning basic postures or movements through repetition.

senses.definition_ko: 칭찬할 만큼 매우 좋고 뛰어나다.

translations.definition: Extremely good and excellent enough to be praised.

senses.definition_ko: 남의 것을 몰래 가져다가 자기 것으로 하다.

translations.definition: To take another person's belongings secretly.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇과 비교해서 차이가 많이 나게.

translations.definition: In the state of something being greatly different from something else it is being compared to.
translations.example: There are far more./There is much more.

senses.definition_ko: 직장이나 군대 등의 단체에 속한 사람이 일정한 기간 동안 일터를 벗어나서 쉬는 일. 또는 그런 기간.

translations.definition: A state in which a person belonging to an organization such as a company or an army leaves his/her workplace and takes a rest for a limited period of time; or such a period.
translations.example: to go on a summer vacation.

senses.definition_ko: 많은 사람이 휴가를 보내는 기간.

translations.definition: The period in which many people go on vacation.

senses.definition_ko: 잠시 머물러 쉴 수 있도록 마련해 놓은 방.

translations.definition: A room arranged for taking a brief rest.
translations.example: to relax in the staff lounge.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 물건을 손에 들거나 몸에 지니고 다님.

translations.definition: A state of carrying an object, or holding it in hand.

senses.definition_ko: 손에 들거나 몸에 지니고 다니면서 걸고 받을 수 있는 무선 전화기.

translations.definition: A portable, wireless phone with which one can make or receive phone calls.
translations.example: to call (someone) on a mobile phone.

senses.definition_ko: 하던 일을 멈추고 잠시 쉼.

translations.definition: An act of stopping what one was doing and taking a brief rest.

senses.definition_ko: 편안히 쉬면서 건강을 잘 돌보기에 알맞은 곳.

translations.definition: A place suitable for taking care of one's health by relaxing.

senses.definition_ko: 일요일이나 공휴일 등과 같이 일을 하지 않고 쉬는 날.

translations.definition: A day of rest free from work such as Sunday or public holidays, etc.
translations.example: to have a lot of days off.

senses.definition_ko: 쓸모없는 종이.

translations.definition: Useless paper.

senses.definition_ko: 못 쓰게 된 종이나 쓰레기 등을 버리는 통.

translations.definition: A container used to throw away waste paper or garbage.
translations.example: to throw (something) in the trash can.

senses.definition_ko: 일정한 기간 동안 학교를 쉬는 일.

translations.definition: An act of taking a break from school during a certain period of time.
translations.example: to request a leave of absence (from school).

senses.definition_ko: 검은색과 흰색.

translations.definition: A compound noun for black and white.

senses.definition_ko: 다른 사람 또는 동물의 말, 소리, 행동 등을 그대로 옮기는 것.

translations.definition: An act of copying the words, sounds, behavior, etc., of another person or animals.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 좌우, 앞뒤로 자꾸 움직이게 하다.

translations.definition: To make something move from side to side and back and forth, repeatedly.

senses.definition_ko: 물 등의 액체가 낮은 곳으로 움직이거나 어떠한 장소를 통과하여 지나가다.

translations.definition: For a liquid like water, etc., to move to a lower place or pass a certain location.

senses.definition_ko: 위아래나 좌우 또는 앞뒤로 자꾸 움직이다.

translations.definition: To move from side to side and back and forth, repeatedly.

senses.definition_ko: 흐르는 것.

translations.definition: A state of flowing.

senses.definition_ko: 사물이나 현상이 없어지거나 지난간 뒤에 남겨진 것.

translations.definition: A mark or trace left after an object or phenomenon disappears or passes by.

senses.definition_ko: 구름이나 안개 때문에 날씨가 맑지 않다.

translations.definition: The weather not being clear due to clouds or fog.

senses.definition_ko: 보통보다 더 많거나 자주 일어나서 쉽게 접할 수 있다.

translations.definition: Something being widely available or easy to obtain because it comes in larger quantity or occurs frequently.

senses.definition_ko: 보통보다 더 자주.

translations.definition: More often than usual.

senses.definition_ko: 마음을 쏠리게 하는 재미.

translations.definition: Fun, amusement, or entertainment that captivates one's mind.

senses.definition_ko: 액체 등이 높은 곳에서 낮은 곳으로 흐르면서 나아가다.

translations.definition: For a liquid like water, etc., to move forward to a lower place.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 자극을 받아 감정이 세차게 치밀어 오름. 또는 그 감정.

translations.definition: A strong surge of an emotion, being exposed to a certain stimulation; or the emotion.

senses.definition_ko: 몸에서 땀, 눈물, 콧물, 피, 침 등의 액체를 밖으로 내다.

translations.definition: To let sweat, tears, nasal discharge, blood, saliva, etc., out of the body.

senses.definition_ko: 한데 모였던 것이 따로따로 떨어지거나 여러 곳으로 퍼지다.

translations.definition: For something stuck together to fall apart separately or spread out in all directions.
translations.example: The fallen leaves scatter in all directions.

senses.definition_ko: 지구의 표면을 덮고 있는, 작은 알갱이로 이루어진 물질.

translations.definition: Substance covering the surface of the Earth, consisting of small grains.

senses.definition_ko: 눈이나 우유의 빛깔처럼 밝고 선명하다.

translations.definition: Bright and clear like the color of snow or milk.
translations.example: to put (something) in a white envelope.

senses.definition_ko: 안이나 속으로 빨아들임.

translations.definition: An act of drawing in or inhaling something.

senses.definition_ko: 앞일에 대하여 기대를 가지고 바람.

translations.definition: The act of having expectations for the future.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 사람이나 목적을 위해 자신의 목숨, 재산, 명예, 이익 등을 바치거나 버림. 또는 그것을 빼앗김.

translations.definition: An act of giving away or relinquishing one's life, property, reputation, interest, etc., for another person or purpose; or the state of being deprived of such things.

senses.definition_ko: 힘을 들여 일을 하다.

translations.definition: To work hard to do something.

senses.definition_ko: 눈이나 우유와 같은 밝은 색.

translations.definition: The bright color of snow or milk.

senses.definition_ko: 힘이 있고 씩씩하다.

translations.definition: Lively and energetic.

senses.definition_ko: 사람이나 동물이 스스로 움직이거나 다른 사물을 움직이게 하는 근육 작용.

translations.definition: The force of muscles with which a person or an animal moves or which makes something move.

senses.definition_ko: 있는 힘을 다하여. 또는 힘이 닿는 데까지.

translations.equivalent: with all one's might; as far as one can
translations.definition: Exerting all one's power; or doing one's best.
translations.example: to push the desk with all one's might.

senses.definition_ko: 힘이 많이 쓰이는 면이 있다.

translations.definition: Requiring much power or effect.

senses.definition_ko: 껍질은 연한 갈색이며 속은 연한 노란색인, 땅속에서 자라는 둥근 덩이 모양의 줄기.

translations.definition: A ball-shaped stem growing underground with pale yellow flesh and light brown skin.

senses.definition_ko: 미처 생각할 틈도 없이 빨리.

translations.definition: Quickly and unexpectedly, without any warning.

entry.visual_material: 기쁘다, 슬프다, 화나다, 놀라다, 두렵다, 무섭다 emojis

senses.definition_ko: 일이나 대상에 대하여 마음에 일어나는 느낌이나 기분.

translations.definition: A feeling or mood one has toward a certain incident or person.

senses.definition_ko: 어떤 일이 갑자기 일어나 뜻밖이다.

translations.definition: Something happening abruptly and unexpectedly.

senses.definition_ko: 보거나 찾지 못하도록 가리거나 숨기다.

translations.definition: To keep something from being seen or found by covering or hiding it.
translations.example: to hide oneself; to disappear from sight.

senses.definition_ko: 사고파는 물건에 일정하게 매겨진 돈의 액수.

translations.definition: The amount of money for which an item was sold, indicating its value in the marketplace.
translations.example: The item has a high price.

senses.definition_ko: 말이나 행동이 주제넘게.

translations.definition: Presumptuously in speaking or behaving.
translations.example: to dare to defy the teacher.

senses.definition_ko: 무엇을 사거나 쓰는 비용이 적다.

translations.definition: The cost for buying or using something being low.

senses.definition_ko: 넓고 길게 흘러 바다로 들어가는 물줄기.

translations.definition: A wide, long stream reaching the sea.
